robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator

Video annotation tool for robotic failure samples with multi-user support.

Usage:

uv run python -m robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator [--samples-dir SAMPLES_DIR] [--port PORT]

Opens http://localhost:5000 in browser for annotation.

   1#!/usr/bin/env python3
   2"""Video annotation tool for robotic failure samples with multi-user support.
   3
   4Usage:
   5    uv run python -m robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator [--samples-dir SAMPLES_DIR] [--port PORT]
   6
   7Opens http://localhost:5000 in browser for annotation.
   8"""
   9
  10from __future__ import annotations
  11
  12import argparse
  13import json
  14import threading
  15import webbrowser
  16from datetime import datetime, timezone
  17from pathlib import Path
  18from typing import Any
  19from urllib.parse import quote
  20
  21import h5py
  22import yaml
  23from flask import Flask, abort, g, jsonify, request, send_file, send_from_directory
  24
  25from robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool import ANNOTATIONS_FILE as DEFAULT_ANNOTATIONS_FILE, QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH, ROBOT_EMBODIMENTS_PATH, POLICIES_PATH
  26
  27app = Flask(__name__)
  28_annotations_lock = threading.Lock()
  29
  30
  31class AnnotatorRuntime:
  32    def __init__(self, samples_dir: Path, annotations_file: Path) -> None:
  33        self.samples_dir = samples_dir.resolve()
  34        self.annotations_file = annotations_file.resolve()
  35        self._reset_state()
  36
  37    def _reset_state(self) -> None:
  38        self.session_samples_dir: Path | None = None
  39        self.task_state: dict[str, Any] = {
  40            "status": "idle",          # "idle" | "pending" | "running" | "annotating"
  41            "pending_instruction": None,
  42            "last_instruction": "",
  43            "current_sample_idx": None,
  44        }
  45        self.session_state: dict[str, Any] = {
  46            "configured": False,
  47            "policy_id": "",
  48            "annotator_name": "",
  49            "camera_names": [],
  50            "session_dir": None,
  51            "annotations_file": str(self.annotations_file),
  52            "prefilled_data": {},
  53        }
  54
  55    def get_samples_dir(self) -> Path:
  56        return self.session_samples_dir if self.session_samples_dir is not None else self.samples_dir
  57
  58    def get_annotations_file(self) -> Path:
  59        return self.annotations_file
  60
  61    def set_annotations_file(self, path: Path) -> Path:
  62        resolved_path = path.resolve()
  63        self.annotations_file = resolved_path
  64        self.session_state["annotations_file"] = str(resolved_path)
  65        return resolved_path
  66
  67
  68def get_runtime() -> AnnotatorRuntime:
  69    runtime = app.extensions.get("annotator_runtime")
  70    if isinstance(runtime, AnnotatorRuntime):
  71        return runtime
  72
  73    runtime = AnnotatorRuntime(
  74        samples_dir=Path("samples"),
  75        annotations_file=DEFAULT_ANNOTATIONS_FILE,
  76    )
  77    app.extensions["annotator_runtime"] = runtime
  78    return runtime
  79
  80
  81def configure_runtime(samples_dir: Path) -> AnnotatorRuntime:
  82    runtime = get_runtime()
  83    runtime.samples_dir = samples_dir.resolve()
  84    runtime._reset_state()
  85    return runtime
  86
  87
  88def get_samples_dir() -> Path:
  89    return get_runtime().get_samples_dir()
  90
  91
  92def get_annotations_file() -> Path:
  93    return get_runtime().get_annotations_file()
  94
  95
  96def set_annotations_file(path: Path) -> Path:
  97    return get_runtime().set_annotations_file(path)
  98
  99
 100def _category_set(annotation: dict[str, Any]) -> set[str]:
 101    cats = annotation.get("failure_category", [])
 102    if isinstance(cats, list):
 103        return {str(c) for c in cats if c}
 104    return {str(cats)} if cats else set()
 105
 106
 107def _strict_match(a: dict[str, Any], b: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
 108    return _category_set(a) == _category_set(b) and a.get("would_retry", "") == b.get("would_retry", "")
 109
 110
 111def _soft_similarity(a: dict[str, Any], b: dict[str, Any]) -> float:
 112    a_set = _category_set(a)
 113    b_set = _category_set(b)
 114    if not a_set and not b_set:
 115        return 1.0
 116    if not a_set or not b_set:
 117        return 0.0
 118    return len(a_set & b_set) / len(a_set | b_set)
 119
 120
 121class AnnotationService:
 122    def load_annotations(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
 123        annotations_file = get_annotations_file()
 124        if annotations_file.exists():
 125            try:
 126                loaded = json.loads(annotations_file.read_text())
 127                if isinstance(loaded, dict):
 128                    # Convert slash-separated keys to internal __ format
 129                    return {k.replace("/", "__"): v for k, v in loaded.items()}
 130            except json.JSONDecodeError:
 131                return {}
 132        return {}
 133
 134    def save_annotations(self, annotations: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
 135        # Convert internal __ keys to slash-separated directory/trajectory_id format
 136        file_annotations = {k.replace("__", "/"): v for k, v in annotations.items()}
 137        get_annotations_file().write_text(json.dumps(file_annotations, indent=2, sort_keys=True))
 138
 139    def get_samples(self) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 140        samples: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 141        annotations = self.load_annotations()
 142
 143        for sample in _build_sample_index().values():
 144            sample_annotations = _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample, annotations)
 145            annotator_names = list(sample_annotations.keys())
 146
 147            human_annotators = [
 148                name for name in annotator_names
 149                if sample_annotations.get(name, {}).get("source") != "vlm"
 150            ]
 151            vlm_annotators = [
 152                name for name in annotator_names
 153                if sample_annotations.get(name, {}).get("source") == "vlm"
 154            ]
 155
 156            samples.append({
 157                "id": sample["id"],
 158                "display_name": sample.get("display_name", sample["id"]),
 159                "subdirectory": sample.get("subdirectory", ""),
 160                "annotators": annotator_names,
 161                "human_annotators": human_annotators,
 162                "vlm_annotators": vlm_annotators,
 163                "annotation_count": len(annotator_names),
 164                "has_human_annotation": len(human_annotators) > 0,
 165                "has_vlm_annotation": len(vlm_annotators) > 0,
 166                "metadata": sample["metadata"],
 167            })
 168
 169        return samples
 170
 171    def initialize_session_annotations(self, annotations_file: Path | None = None) -> Path:
 172        if annotations_file is not None:
 173            annotations_path = annotations_file.resolve()
 174        else:
 175            annotations_path = get_samples_dir().resolve() / "annotations.json"
 176        annotations_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 177        set_annotations_file(annotations_path)
 178
 179        if not annotations_path.exists():
 180            self.save_annotations(_h5_annotations_snapshot())
 181
 182        return annotations_path
 183
 184    def get_sample_entry(self, sample_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 185        return _build_sample_index().get(sample_id)
 186
 187    def get_annotations_for_sample(self, sample_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 188        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
 189        if sample_entry is None:
 190            return {}
 191        annotations = self.load_annotations()
 192        return _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample_entry, annotations)
 193
 194    def get_annotation_for_annotator(self, sample_id: str, annotator_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 195        sample_annotations = self.get_annotations_for_sample(sample_id)
 196        annotation = sample_annotations.get(annotator_name, {})
 197        return annotation if isinstance(annotation, dict) else {}
 198
 199    def save_sample_annotation(self, sample_id: str, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
 200        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator", "")).strip()
 201        if not annotator_name:
 202            return {"error": "Annotator name is required"}, 400
 203
 204        reserved = {"annotator", "annotated_at", "source", "__metadata"}
 205        annotation = {k: v for k, v in data.items() if k not in reserved}
 206        annotation.update({
 207            "annotated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
 208            "annotator": annotator_name,
 209            "source": "human",
 210        })
 211
 212        with _annotations_lock:
 213            annotations = self.load_annotations()
 214            annotations.setdefault(sample_id, {})[annotator_name] = annotation
 215            self.save_annotations(annotations)
 216
 217        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
 218        if sample_entry is not None:
 219            metadata_updates = data.get("__metadata", {})
 220            if isinstance(metadata_updates, dict):
 221                _write_metadata_to_h5(sample_entry, metadata_updates)
 222            _write_annotation_to_h5(sample_entry, annotation, annotator_name)
 223
 224        return {"status": "saved", "annotation": annotation}, 200
 225
 226    def save_batch_metadata(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
 227        subdirectory = data.get("subdirectory", "")
 228        metadata_updates = data.get("metadata", {})
 229
 230        if not isinstance(subdirectory, str):
 231            return {"error": "subdirectory must be a string"}, 400
 232        if not isinstance(metadata_updates, dict):
 233            return {"error": "metadata must be an object"}, 400
 234
 235        allowed_keys = {"policy_id", "lab_id", "operator_name", "robot_id", "control_freq"}
 236        filtered_metadata = {
 237            key: value
 238            for key, value in metadata_updates.items()
 239            if key in allowed_keys
 240        }
 241        if not filtered_metadata:
 242            return {"error": "No batch metadata fields were provided"}, 400
 243
 244        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
 245        target_samples = [
 246            sample
 247            for sample in sample_index.values()
 248            if str(sample.get("subdirectory", "")) == subdirectory
 249        ]
 250
 251        writable_samples = [
 252            sample
 253            for sample in target_samples
 254            if isinstance(sample.get("h5_path"), Path)
 255        ]
 256
 257        for sample in writable_samples:
 258            _write_metadata_to_h5(sample, filtered_metadata)
 259
 260        return {
 261            "status": "saved",
 262            "subdirectory": subdirectory,
 263            "selected_fields": sorted(filtered_metadata.keys()),
 264            "total_in_subdirectory": len(target_samples),
 265            "updated_h5_samples": len(writable_samples),
 266        }, 200
 267
 268    def list_annotators(self) -> list[str]:
 269        annotations = self.load_annotations()
 270        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
 271        annotators: set[str] = set()
 272        for sample in sample_index.values():
 273            sample_annotations = _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample, annotations)
 274            annotators.update(sample_annotations.keys())
 275        return sorted(annotators)
 276
 277    def accept_vlm_annotation(self, sample_id: str, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
 278        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator", "")).strip()
 279        vlm_annotator = str(data.get("vlm_annotator", "")).strip()
 280
 281        if not annotator_name:
 282            return {"error": "Human annotator name is required"}, 400
 283
 284        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
 285        if sample_entry is None:
 286            return {"error": "Sample not found"}, 404
 287
 288        with _annotations_lock:
 289            annotations = self.load_annotations()
 290            sample_annotations = _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample_entry, annotations)
 291
 292            vlm_ann: dict[str, Any] | None = None
 293            if vlm_annotator and vlm_annotator in sample_annotations:
 294                candidate = sample_annotations[vlm_annotator]
 295                if isinstance(candidate, dict):
 296                    vlm_ann = candidate
 297            else:
 298                for name, ann in sample_annotations.items():
 299                    if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm":
 300                        vlm_ann = ann
 301                        vlm_annotator = name
 302                        break
 303
 304            if not vlm_ann:
 305                return {"error": "No VLM annotation found"}, 404
 306
 307            human_ann = {
 308                "failure_category": data.get("failure_category", vlm_ann.get("failure_category", "")),
 309                "failure_description": data.get("failure_description", vlm_ann.get("failure_description", "")),
 310                "would_retry": data.get("would_retry", vlm_ann.get("would_retry", "")),
 311                "additional_notes": data.get("additional_notes", vlm_ann.get("additional_notes", "")),
 312                "annotated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
 313                "annotator": annotator_name,
 314                "source": "vlm_accepted",
 315                "vlm_source": vlm_annotator,
 316            }
 317
 318            annotations.setdefault(sample_id, {})[annotator_name] = human_ann
 319            self.save_annotations(annotations)
 320
 321        _write_annotation_to_h5(sample_entry, human_ann, annotator_name)
 322
 323        return {"status": "accepted", "annotation": human_ann}, 200
 324
 325    def get_overview_payload(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
 326        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
 327        annotations = self.load_annotations()
 328        merged_by_sample = {
 329            sid: _merged_annotations_for_sample(entry, annotations)
 330            for sid, entry in sample_index.items()
 331        }
 332
 333        human_annotators: set[str] = set()
 334        vlm_annotators: set[str] = set()
 335        for sample_anns in merged_by_sample.values():
 336            for name, ann in sample_anns.items():
 337                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm":
 338                    vlm_annotators.add(name)
 339                else:
 340                    human_annotators.add(name)
 341        all_annotators = sorted(human_annotators) + sorted(vlm_annotators)
 342
 343        overview_samples: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 344        agreement_count = 0
 345        disagreement_count = 0
 346        multi_annotated = 0
 347        human_soft_sum = 0.0
 348        human_soft_count = 0
 349        vlm_human_samples = 0
 350        vlm_human_agreement = 0
 351        vlm_human_disagreement = 0
 352        vlm_human_soft_sum = 0.0
 353        vlm_human_soft_count = 0
 354
 355        for sid, sample_entry in sample_index.items():
 356            sample_anns = merged_by_sample[sid]
 357
 358            human_anns = {
 359                name: ann for name, ann in sample_anns.items()
 360                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") != "vlm"
 361            }
 362            vlm_anns = {
 363                name: ann for name, ann in sample_anns.items()
 364                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm"
 365            }
 366
 367            has_disagreement = False
 368            if len(human_anns) >= 2:
 369                multi_annotated += 1
 370                cats = [_category_set(a) for a in human_anns.values()]
 371                retries = [a.get("would_retry", "") for a in human_anns.values()]
 372
 373                if len(set(map(frozenset, cats))) > 1 or len(set(retries)) > 1:
 374                    has_disagreement = True
 375                    disagreement_count += 1
 376                else:
 377                    agreement_count += 1
 378
 379            human_soft_agreement: float | None = None
 380            if len(human_anns) >= 2:
 381                sims: list[float] = []
 382                human_values = list(human_anns.values())
 383                for i in range(len(human_values)):
 384                    for j in range(i + 1, len(human_values)):
 385                        sims.append(_soft_similarity(human_values[i], human_values[j]))
 386                if sims:
 387                    human_soft_agreement = sum(sims) / len(sims)
 388                    human_soft_sum += human_soft_agreement
 389                    human_soft_count += 1
 390
 391            vlm_human_soft_agreement: float | None = None
 392            vlm_human_strict_match = False
 393            if human_anns and vlm_anns:
 394                vlm_human_samples += 1
 395                sims = []
 396                for h in human_anns.values():
 397                    for v in vlm_anns.values():
 398                        sims.append(_soft_similarity(h, v))
 399                        if _strict_match(h, v):
 400                            vlm_human_strict_match = True
 401                if sims:
 402                    vlm_human_soft_agreement = sum(sims) / len(sims)
 403                    vlm_human_soft_sum += vlm_human_soft_agreement
 404                    vlm_human_soft_count += 1
 405                if vlm_human_strict_match:
 406                    vlm_human_agreement += 1
 407                else:
 408                    vlm_human_disagreement += 1
 409
 410            overview_samples.append({
 411                "id": sid,
 412                "metadata": sample_entry["metadata"],
 413                "annotations": sample_anns,
 414                "annotator_count": len(sample_anns),
 415                "human_annotator_count": len(human_anns),
 416                "vlm_annotator_count": len(vlm_anns),
 417                "has_vlm_annotation": len(vlm_anns) > 0,
 418                "human_soft_agreement": human_soft_agreement,
 419                "vlm_human_soft_agreement": vlm_human_soft_agreement,
 420                "vlm_human_strict_match": vlm_human_strict_match,
 421                "has_disagreement": has_disagreement,
 422            })
 423
 424        return {
 425            "samples": overview_samples,
 426            "annotators": all_annotators,
 427            "human_annotators": sorted(human_annotators),
 428            "vlm_annotators": sorted(vlm_annotators),
 429            "stats": {
 430                "total_samples": len(sample_index),
 431                "multi_annotated": multi_annotated,
 432                "agreement": agreement_count,
 433                "disagreement": disagreement_count,
 434                "human_soft_agreement_avg": (human_soft_sum / human_soft_count) if human_soft_count else None,
 435                "vlm_human_samples": vlm_human_samples,
 436                "vlm_human_agreement": vlm_human_agreement,
 437                "vlm_human_disagreement": vlm_human_disagreement,
 438                "vlm_human_soft_agreement_avg": (vlm_human_soft_sum / vlm_human_soft_count) if vlm_human_soft_count else None,
 439            },
 440        }
 441
 442
 443class RuntimeService:
 444    def get_task_state(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
 445        return get_runtime().task_state
 446
 447    def submit_task(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
 448        runtime = get_runtime()
 449        runtime.task_state["pending_instruction"] = data.get("instruction", "")
 450        runtime.task_state["status"] = "pending"
 451        return {"status": "ok"}
 452
 453    def start_task(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
 454        runtime = get_runtime()
 455        instruction = data.get("instruction", runtime.task_state.get("pending_instruction", ""))
 456        runtime.task_state["last_instruction"] = instruction
 457        runtime.task_state["pending_instruction"] = None
 458        runtime.task_state["status"] = "running"
 459        return {"status": "ok"}
 460
 461    def set_task_annotating(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
 462        runtime = get_runtime()
 463        runtime.task_state["current_sample_idx"] = data.get("sample_idx")
 464        runtime.task_state["status"] = "annotating"
 465        return {"status": "ok"}
 466
 467    def mark_task_done(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
 468        runtime = get_runtime()
 469        runtime.task_state["status"] = "idle"
 470        runtime.task_state["current_sample_idx"] = None
 471        return {"status": "ok"}
 472
 473    def get_session_state(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
 474        return get_runtime().session_state
 475
 476    def create_session(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
 477        runtime = get_runtime()
 478        if runtime.session_state["configured"]:
 479            return {"error": "Session already configured. Restart to start a new session."}, 409
 480
 481        policy_id = str(data.get("policy_id", "")).strip()
 482        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator_name", "")).strip()
 483        raw_camera_names = data.get("camera_names", [])
 484        camera_names = [c.strip() for c in raw_camera_names if isinstance(c, str) and c.strip()]
 485
 486        if not policy_id:
 487            return {"error": "policy_id is required"}, 400
 488        if not annotator_name:
 489            return {"error": "annotator_name is required"}, 400
 490        if not camera_names:
 491            return {"error": "at least one camera name is required"}, 400
 492
 493        ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
 494        safe_annotator = "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_" else "_" for c in annotator_name)
 495        safe_policy = "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_" else "_" for c in policy_id)
 496        dir_name = f"{ts}_{safe_annotator}_{safe_policy}"
 497        session_dir = runtime.samples_dir / dir_name
 498        session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 499
 500        runtime.session_samples_dir = session_dir
 501        session_annotations_path = get_annotation_service().initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file=session_dir / "annotations.json")
 502        runtime.session_state.update({
 503            "configured": True,
 504            "policy_id": policy_id,
 505            "annotator_name": annotator_name,
 506            "camera_names": camera_names,
 507            "session_dir": str(session_dir),
 508            "annotations_file": str(session_annotations_path),
 509            "prefilled_data": {},
 510        })
 511        return {
 512            "status": "created",
 513            "session_dir": str(session_dir),
 514            "annotations_file": str(session_annotations_path),
 515        }, 200
 516
 517    def prefill_session(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
 518        runtime = get_runtime()
 519        if runtime.session_state["configured"]:
 520            return {"status": "already_configured"}
 521
 522        runtime.session_state["prefilled_data"] = {
 523            "policy_id": data.get("policy_id", ""),
 524            "camera_names": data.get("camera_names", []),
 525        }
 526        return {"status": "prefilled"}
 527
 528
 529def get_annotation_service() -> AnnotationService:
 530    service = app.extensions.get("annotation_service")
 531    if isinstance(service, AnnotationService):
 532        return service
 533
 534    service = AnnotationService()
 535    app.extensions["annotation_service"] = service
 536    return service
 537
 538
 539def get_runtime_service() -> RuntimeService:
 540    service = app.extensions.get("runtime_service")
 541    if isinstance(service, RuntimeService):
 542        return service
 543
 544    service = RuntimeService()
 545    app.extensions["runtime_service"] = service
 546    return service
 547
 548
 549
 550def _decode_h5_value(value: Any) -> Any:
 551    if isinstance(value, (bytes, bytearray)):
 552        return value.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
 553
 554    if hasattr(value, "shape") and getattr(value, "shape", None) == ():
 555        try:
 556            return _decode_h5_value(value.item())
 557        except Exception:
 558            return value
 559
 560    if hasattr(value, "tolist"):
 561        try:
 562            listed = value.tolist()
 563            if isinstance(listed, list):
 564                return [_decode_h5_value(v) for v in listed]
 565            return _decode_h5_value(listed)
 566        except Exception:
 567            pass
 568
 569    return value
 570
 571
 572def _read_h5_dataset(group: h5py.Group | h5py.File, key: str, default: Any = "") -> Any:
 573    if key not in group:
 574        return default
 575    try:
 576        return _decode_h5_value(group[key][()])
 577    except Exception:
 578        return default
 579
 580
 581def _read_h5_attr(group: h5py.Group | h5py.File, key: str, default: Any = "") -> Any:
 582    """Read a metadata field from HDF5 attributes."""
 583    return _decode_h5_value(group.attrs.get(key, default))
 584
 585
 586def _failure_annotation_from_h5_group(group: h5py.Group | h5py.Dataset | None) -> dict[str, Any]:
 587    if group is None:
 588        return {}
 589
 590    if isinstance(group, h5py.Dataset):
 591        value = _decode_h5_value(group[()])
 592        if isinstance(value, str):
 593            stripped = value.strip()
 594            if stripped.startswith("[") or stripped.startswith("{"):
 595                try:
 596                    value = json.loads(stripped)
 597                except json.JSONDecodeError:
 598                    pass
 599        if isinstance(value, dict):
 600            return {str(k): v for k, v in value.items()}
 601        if value in ("", None):
 602            return {}
 603        return {"question": value}
 604
 605    annotation: dict[str, Any] = {}
 606    for key in group.keys():
 607        node = group.get(key)
 608        if isinstance(node, h5py.Dataset):
 609            value = _decode_h5_value(node[()])
 610        else:
 611            value = _read_h5_dataset(group, key, "")
 612
 613        if isinstance(value, str):
 614            stripped = value.strip()
 615            if stripped.startswith("[") or stripped.startswith("{"):
 616                try:
 617                    value = json.loads(stripped)
 618                except json.JSONDecodeError:
 619                    pass
 620
 621        if key == "question":
 622            if isinstance(value, dict):
 623                for sub_key, sub_value in value.items():
 624                    annotation[str(sub_key)] = sub_value
 625            elif value not in ("", None):
 626                annotation["question"] = value
 627            continue
 628
 629        if value not in ("", None):
 630            annotation[key] = value
 631    return annotation
 632
 633
 634def _sample_id_from_h5_path(h5_path: Path) -> str:
 635    samples_root = get_samples_dir().resolve()
 636    try:
 637        rel = h5_path.resolve().relative_to(samples_root)
 638        return rel.with_suffix("").as_posix().replace("/", "__")
 639    except ValueError:
 640        return h5_path.stem
 641
 642
 643def _sample_subdirectory_from_path(path: Path) -> str:
 644    samples_root = get_samples_dir().resolve()
 645    try:
 646        rel_parent = path.resolve().relative_to(samples_root).parent
 647        return "" if rel_parent == Path(".") else rel_parent.as_posix()
 648    except ValueError:
 649        return ""
 650
 651
 652def _extract_policy_name_from_h5_filename(h5_path: Path, policy_id: str) -> str:
 653    stem = h5_path.stem
 654    if policy_id and stem.startswith(f"{policy_id}_"):
 655        return stem[len(policy_id) + 1 :]
 656    parts = stem.split("_", 1)
 657    return parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else stem
 658
 659
 660def _relative_to_samples_dir(path: Path) -> str | None:
 661    samples_root = get_samples_dir().resolve()
 662    try:
 663        return path.resolve().relative_to(samples_root).as_posix()
 664    except ValueError:
 665        return None
 666
 667
 668def _resolve_video_path(raw_path: str, h5_path: Path) -> Path | None:
 669    candidate = Path(raw_path)
 670
 671    if candidate.is_absolute():
 672        if candidate.exists():
 673            return candidate
 674    else:
 675        local_candidate = (h5_path.parent / candidate).resolve()
 676        if local_candidate.exists():
 677            return local_candidate
 678
 679    basename_candidate = (h5_path.parent / candidate.name).resolve()
 680    if basename_candidate.exists():
 681        return basename_candidate
 682
 683    samples_root_candidate = (get_samples_dir().resolve() / candidate.name).resolve()
 684    if samples_root_candidate.exists():
 685        return samples_root_candidate
 686
 687    return None
 688
 689
 690def _read_h5_sample(h5_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
 691    metadata: dict[str, Any] = {}
 692    h5_annotation: dict[str, Any] = {}
 693    video_urls: dict[str, str] = {}
 694
 695    with h5py.File(h5_path, "r") as h5f:
 696        episode_annotations = h5f.get("episode_annotations")
 697        episode_metadata = h5f.get("episode_metadata")
 698
 699        if isinstance(episode_annotations, h5py.Group):
 700            meta_group = episode_annotations
 701            nested_failure = episode_annotations.get("failure_annotation")
 702        else:
 703            meta_group = episode_metadata if isinstance(episode_metadata, h5py.Group) else None
 704            nested_failure = None
 705
 706        policy_id = ""
 707        if isinstance(meta_group, h5py.Group):
 708            policy_id = str(_read_h5_attr(meta_group, "policy_id", ""))
 709
 710        success_value = None
 711        if isinstance(episode_annotations, h5py.Group):
 712            success_value = _read_h5_attr(episode_annotations, "success", None)
 713        if success_value is None:
 714            success_value = _read_h5_attr(h5f, "success", None)
 715
 716        success_float: float | None = None
 717        if success_value is not None:
 718            try:
 719                success_float = float(success_value)
 720            except (TypeError, ValueError):
 721                success_float = None
 722
 723        episode_id_value = ""
 724        if isinstance(episode_annotations, h5py.Group):
 725            episode_id_value = str(_read_h5_attr(episode_annotations, "episode_id", ""))
 726        if not episode_id_value:
 727            episode_id_value = str(_read_h5_attr(h5f, "episode_id", ""))
 728        if not episode_id_value:
 729            episode_id_value = _sample_id_from_h5_path(h5_path)
 730
 731        metadata = {
 732            "episode_id": episode_id_value,
 733            "lab_id": str(_read_h5_attr(meta_group, "lab_id", "")) if isinstance(meta_group, h5py.Group) else "",
 734            "operator_name": str(_read_h5_attr(meta_group, "operator_name", "")) if isinstance(meta_group, h5py.Group) else "",
 735            "policy_id": policy_id,
 736            "policy_name": _extract_policy_name_from_h5_filename(h5_path, policy_id),
 737            "robot_id": str(_read_h5_attr(meta_group, "robot_id", "")) if isinstance(meta_group, h5py.Group) else "",
 738            "control_freq": str(_read_h5_attr(meta_group, "control_freq", "")) if isinstance(meta_group, h5py.Group) else "",
 739            "language_instruction": str(_read_h5_attr(h5f, "language_instruction", "")),
 740            "success": success_float,
 741        }
 742
 743        fallback_failure = h5f.get("failure_annotation")
 744        failure_source = nested_failure if nested_failure is not None else fallback_failure
 745        h5_annotation = _failure_annotation_from_h5_group(failure_source)
 746        if h5_annotation:
 747            h5_annotation.setdefault("source", "dataset")
 748            h5_annotation.setdefault(
 749                "annotator",
 750                metadata.get("operator_name") or "dataset",
 751            )
 752
 753        image_group = h5f.get("image_observations")
 754        if isinstance(image_group, h5py.Group):
 755            for camera in image_group.keys():
 756                raw_path = _read_h5_dataset(image_group, camera, "")
 757                if not isinstance(raw_path, str) or not raw_path:
 758                    continue
 759                video_path = _resolve_video_path(raw_path, h5_path)
 760                if video_path is None:
 761                    continue
 762                rel = _relative_to_samples_dir(video_path)
 763                if rel is not None:
 764                    video_urls[camera] = f"/videos-path/{quote(rel, safe='/')}"
 765
 766    return {
 767        "id": _sample_id_from_h5_path(h5_path),
 768        "display_name": h5_path.stem,
 769        "subdirectory": _sample_subdirectory_from_path(h5_path),
 770        "metadata": metadata,
 771        "video_urls": video_urls,
 772        "h5_path": h5_path,
 773        "h5_annotation": h5_annotation,
 774    }
 775
 776
 777def _build_sample_index() -> dict[str, dict[str, Any]]:
 778    try:
 779        cached = g.get("_sample_index")
 780        if cached is not None:
 781            return cached
 782    except RuntimeError:
 783        return _build_sample_index_impl()
 784    result = _build_sample_index_impl()
 785    g._sample_index = result
 786    return result
 787
 788
 789def _build_sample_index_impl() -> dict[str, dict[str, Any]]:
 790    samples_dir = get_samples_dir()
 791    index: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
 792
 793    h5_paths = sorted([
 794        *samples_dir.rglob("*.h5"),
 795        *samples_dir.rglob("*.hdf5"),
 796    ])
 797
 798    for h5_path in h5_paths:
 799        try:
 800            sample = _read_h5_sample(h5_path)
 801        except Exception:
 802            continue
 803        index[sample["id"]] = sample
 804
 805    return index
 806
 807
 808def _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample_entry: dict[str, Any], json_annotations: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
 809    sample_id = sample_entry["id"]
 810    merged = dict(json_annotations.get(sample_id, {}))
 811
 812    h5_annotation = sample_entry.get("h5_annotation") or {}
 813    if h5_annotation:
 814        h5_annotator = str(h5_annotation.get("annotator") or sample_entry.get("metadata", {}).get("operator_name") or "dataset")
 815        if h5_annotator not in merged:
 816            merged[h5_annotator] = h5_annotation
 817
 818    return merged
 819
 820
 821def _h5_annotations_snapshot() -> dict[str, dict[str, Any]]:
 822    persisted: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
 823    for sample in _build_sample_index().values():
 824        h5_annotation = sample.get("h5_annotation") or {}
 825        if not h5_annotation:
 826            continue
 827
 828        annotator = str(
 829            h5_annotation.get("annotator")
 830            or sample.get("metadata", {}).get("operator_name")
 831            or "dataset"
 832        )
 833        sample_id = str(sample.get("id", ""))
 834        if not sample_id:
 835            continue
 836
 837        persisted.setdefault(sample_id, {})[annotator] = dict(h5_annotation)
 838    return persisted
 839
 840
 841def initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file: Path | None = None) -> Path:
 842    return get_annotation_service().initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file=annotations_file)
 843
 844
 845def _write_annotation_to_h5(sample_entry: dict[str, Any], annotation: dict[str, Any], annotator_name: str) -> None:
 846    h5_path = sample_entry.get("h5_path")
 847    if not isinstance(h5_path, Path) or not h5_path.exists():
 848        return
 849
 850    storable_annotation = dict(annotation)
 851
 852    str_dtype = h5py.string_dtype(encoding="utf-8")
 853    with h5py.File(h5_path, "r+") as h5f:
 854        episode_annotations = h5f.require_group("episode_annotations")
 855        if "operator_name" in episode_annotations:
 856            del episode_annotations["operator_name"]
 857        episode_annotations.create_dataset("operator_name", data=str(annotator_name), dtype=str_dtype)
 858        failure_group = episode_annotations.require_group("failure_annotation")
 859
 860        for key in list(failure_group.keys()):
 861            del failure_group[key]
 862
 863        failure_group.create_dataset(
 864            "question",
 865            data=json.dumps(storable_annotation, ensure_ascii=False),
 866            dtype=str_dtype,
 867        )
 868
 869
 870def _write_metadata_to_h5(sample_entry: dict[str, Any], metadata: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
 871    h5_path = sample_entry.get("h5_path")
 872    if not isinstance(h5_path, Path) or not h5_path.exists():
 873        return
 874
 875    with h5py.File(h5_path, "r+") as h5f:
 876        episode_annotations = h5f.require_group("episode_annotations")
 877
 878        for key in ("episode_id", "lab_id", "operator_name", "policy_id", "robot_id", "control_freq"):
 879            value = metadata.get(key)
 880            if value is None:
 881                continue
 882            episode_annotations.attrs[key] = str(value)
 883
 884        if "success" in metadata:
 885            success_value = metadata.get("success")
 886            if success_value not in ("", None):
 887                success_float: float | None = None
 888                if isinstance(success_value, (int, float)):
 889                    success_float = float(success_value)
 890                elif isinstance(success_value, str):
 891                    stripped = success_value.strip()
 892                    if stripped:
 893                        try:
 894                            success_float = float(stripped)
 895                        except ValueError:
 896                            pass
 897                if success_float is not None:
 898                    episode_annotations.attrs["success"] = success_float
 899
 900        if "language_instruction" in metadata:
 901            h5f.attrs["language_instruction"] = str(metadata.get("language_instruction") or "")
 902
 903
 904def load_questionnaire() -> dict:
 905    """Load questionnaire configuration from YAML."""
 906    if QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.exists():
 907        return yaml.safe_load(QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.read_text())
 908    return {"title": "Annotation", "questions": []}
 909
 910
 911def _load_options_list(path: Path) -> list[str]:
 912    """Load dropdown options from a text file, one entry per line."""
 913    if not path.exists():
 914        return []
 915    return [
 916        line.strip()
 917        for line in path.read_text().splitlines()
 918        if line.strip() and not line.strip().startswith("#")
 919    ]
 920
 921
 922def _json_payload() -> dict[str, Any]:
 923    payload = request.get_json(silent=True)
 924    if isinstance(payload, dict):
 925        return payload
 926    return {}
 927
 928
 929# API Routes
 930
 931
 932@app.route("/")
 933def index():
 934    """Serve the annotation UI."""
 935    return HTML_TEMPLATE
 936
 937
 938@app.route("/api/config")
 939def api_config():
 940    """Return server-side configuration for the frontend."""
 941    return jsonify({"samples_dir": str(get_samples_dir().resolve())})
 942
 943
 944@app.route("/api/samples")
 945def api_samples():
 946    """List all samples with annotation status."""
 947    return jsonify(get_annotation_service().get_samples())
 948
 949
 950@app.route("/api/samples/<sample_id>")
 951def api_sample(sample_id: str):
 952    """Get sample metadata and video URLs for all views."""
 953    sample_entry = _build_sample_index().get(sample_id)
 954    if sample_entry is None:
 955        return jsonify({"error": "Sample not found"}), 404
 956
 957    metadata = sample_entry.get("metadata", {})
 958    video_urls = sample_entry.get("video_urls", {})
 959
 960    return jsonify({
 961        "id": sample_id,
 962        "video_urls": video_urls,
 963        "metadata": metadata,
 964    })
 965
 966
 967@app.route("/api/questionnaire")
 968def api_questionnaire():
 969    """Get questionnaire configuration."""
 970    return jsonify(load_questionnaire())
 971
 972
 973@app.route("/api/questionnaire/raw")
 974def api_questionnaire_raw():
 975    """Get raw YAML content for editing."""
 976    if QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.exists():
 977        return QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.read_text(), 200, {"Content-Type": "text/plain"}
 978    return "", 200, {"Content-Type": "text/plain"}
 979
 980
 981@app.route("/api/questionnaire/raw", methods=["POST"])
 982def api_questionnaire_save():
 983    """Save questionnaire YAML content."""
 984    content = request.data.decode("utf-8")
 985    # Validate YAML syntax
 986    try:
 987        parsed = yaml.safe_load(content)
 988        if not isinstance(parsed, dict):
 989            return jsonify({"error": "YAML must be a dictionary with 'title' and 'questions' keys"}), 400
 990    except yaml.YAMLError as e:
 991        return jsonify({"error": f"Invalid YAML: {e}"}), 400
 992
 993    QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.write_text(content)
 994    return jsonify({"status": "saved"})
 995
 996
 997@app.route("/api/options")
 998def api_options():
 999    """Return dropdown option lists for robot embodiments and policies."""
1000    return jsonify({
1001        "robot_embodiments": _load_options_list(ROBOT_EMBODIMENTS_PATH),
1002        "policies": _load_options_list(POLICIES_PATH),
1003    })
1004
1005
1006@app.route("/api/annotations/<sample_id>", methods=["GET"])
1007def api_get_annotations(sample_id: str):
1008    """Get all annotations for a sample (all annotators)."""
1009    return jsonify(get_annotation_service().get_annotations_for_sample(sample_id))
1010
1011
1012@app.route("/api/annotations/<sample_id>/<annotator_name>", methods=["GET"])
1013def api_get_annotation_for_annotator(sample_id: str, annotator_name: str):
1014    """Get existing annotation for a sample by specific annotator."""
1015    annotation = get_annotation_service().get_annotation_for_annotator(sample_id, annotator_name)
1016    return jsonify(annotation)
1017
1018
1019@app.route("/api/annotations/<sample_id>", methods=["POST"])
1020def api_save_annotation(sample_id: str):
1021    """Save annotation for a sample. Requires 'annotator' field in request."""
1022    payload, status = get_annotation_service().save_sample_annotation(sample_id, _json_payload())
1023    return jsonify(payload), status
1024
1025
1026@app.route("/api/metadata/batch", methods=["POST"])
1027def api_batch_save_metadata():
1028    """Apply selected metadata fields to all samples in a subdirectory."""
1029    payload, status = get_annotation_service().save_batch_metadata(_json_payload())
1030    return jsonify(payload), status
1031
1032
1033@app.route("/api/annotators")
1034def api_annotators():
1035    """List all annotators who have contributed annotations."""
1036    return jsonify(get_annotation_service().list_annotators())
1037
1038
1039@app.route("/api/annotations/<sample_id>/accept-vlm", methods=["POST"])
1040def api_accept_vlm_annotation(sample_id: str):
1041    """Accept VLM annotation and save under human annotator name."""
1042    payload, status = get_annotation_service().accept_vlm_annotation(sample_id, _json_payload())
1043    return jsonify(payload), status
1044
1045
1046@app.route("/videos/<filename>")
1047def serve_video(filename: str):
1048    """Serve video files."""
1049    if filename.lower().endswith(".mp4"):
1050        return send_from_directory(get_samples_dir(), filename, mimetype="video/mp4")
1051    return send_from_directory(get_samples_dir(), filename)
1052
1053
1054@app.route("/videos-path/<path:video_path>")
1055def serve_video_by_path(video_path: str):
1056    """Serve videos addressed by path relative to samples directory."""
1057    samples_root = get_samples_dir().resolve()
1058    target_path = (samples_root / video_path).resolve()
1059
1060    try:
1061        target_path.relative_to(samples_root)
1062    except ValueError:
1063        abort(403)
1064
1065    if not target_path.exists() or not target_path.is_file():
1066        abort(404)
1067
1068    if target_path.suffix.lower() == ".mp4":
1069        return send_file(target_path, mimetype="video/mp4")
1070    return send_file(target_path)
1071
1072
1073@app.route("/overview")
1074def overview():
1075    """Serve the annotation overview/comparison page."""
1076    return OVERVIEW_HTML
1077
1078
1079@app.route("/api/overview")
1080def api_overview():
1081    """Get all samples with full annotations for overview display."""
1082    return jsonify(get_annotation_service().get_overview_payload())
1083

1089@app.route("/task")
1090def task_page():
1091    """Serve the task setup page."""
1092    return TASK_HTML
1093
1094
1095@app.route("/api/task/state")
1096def api_task_state():
1097    """Return current task state."""
1098    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().get_task_state())
1099
1100
1101@app.route("/api/task/submit", methods=["POST"])
1102def api_task_submit():
1103    """Browser submits a new task instruction."""
1104    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().submit_task(_json_payload()))
1105
1106
1107@app.route("/api/task/start", methods=["POST"])
1108def api_task_start():
1109    """Script confirms it has picked up the task and is starting the rollout."""
1110    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().start_task(_json_payload()))
1111
1112
1113@app.route("/api/task/annotating", methods=["POST"])
1114def api_task_annotating():
1115    """Script signals rollout is done and annotation is needed."""
1116    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().set_task_annotating(_json_payload()))
1117
1118
1119@app.route("/api/task/done", methods=["POST"])
1120def api_task_done():
1121    """Script signals annotation is complete and we're ready for the next task."""
1122    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().mark_task_done())
1123
1124
1125@app.route("/api/session", methods=["GET"])
1126def api_session_get():
1127    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().get_session_state())
1128
1129
1130@app.route("/api/session", methods=["POST"])
1131def api_session_create():
1132    payload, status = get_runtime_service().create_session(_json_payload())
1133    return jsonify(payload), status
1134
1135
1136@app.route("/api/session/prefill", methods=["POST"])
1137def api_session_prefill():
1138    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().prefill_session(_json_payload()))
1139
1140
1141# External HTML templates
1142
1143TEMPLATE_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "templates"
1144
1145def _load_external_template(filename: str) -> str:
1146    template_path = TEMPLATE_DIR / filename
1147    if not template_path.exists():
1148        raise FileNotFoundError("Missing template file: " + str(template_path))
1149    return template_path.read_text()
1150
1151TASK_HTML = _load_external_template("task.html")
1152OVERVIEW_HTML = _load_external_template("overview.html")
1153HTML_TEMPLATE = _load_external_template("annotator.html")
1154
1155def main():
1156    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Video annotation tool for robotic failure samples")
1157    parser.add_argument("--samples-dir", type=Path, default=Path("samples"), help="Directory containing sample videos and metadata")
1158    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=5001, help="Port to run the server on")
1159    parser.add_argument("--annotations-file", type=Path, default=None, help="Path to annotations JSON file (default: annotations.json inside --samples-dir)")
1160    parser.add_argument("--no-browser", action="store_true", help="Don't open browser automatically")
1161    args = parser.parse_args()
1162
1163    runtime = configure_runtime(args.samples_dir.resolve())
1164
1165    if not runtime.samples_dir.exists():
1166        print(f"Error: Samples directory not found: {runtime.samples_dir}")
1167        return 1
1168
1169    annotations_file: Path | None = args.annotations_file.resolve() if args.annotations_file else None
1170    session_annotations_path = initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file=annotations_file)
1171
1172    print(f"Serving samples from: {runtime.samples_dir}")
1173    print(f"Questionnaire: {QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH}")
1174    print(f"Annotations will be saved to: {session_annotations_path.resolve()}")
1175    print(f"\nStarting server at http://localhost:{args.port}")
1176
1177    if not args.no_browser:
1178        webbrowser.open(f"http://localhost:{args.port}")
1179
1180    app.run(host="localhost", port=args.port, debug=False)
1181
1182
1183if __name__ == "__main__":
1184    main()
app = <Flask 'robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator'>
class AnnotatorRuntime: 
32class AnnotatorRuntime:
33    def __init__(self, samples_dir: Path, annotations_file: Path) -> None:
34        self.samples_dir = samples_dir.resolve()
35        self.annotations_file = annotations_file.resolve()
36        self._reset_state()
37
38    def _reset_state(self) -> None:
39        self.session_samples_dir: Path | None = None
40        self.task_state: dict[str, Any] = {
41            "status": "idle",          # "idle" | "pending" | "running" | "annotating"
42            "pending_instruction": None,
43            "last_instruction": "",
44            "current_sample_idx": None,
45        }
46        self.session_state: dict[str, Any] = {
47            "configured": False,
48            "policy_id": "",
49            "annotator_name": "",
50            "camera_names": [],
51            "session_dir": None,
52            "annotations_file": str(self.annotations_file),
53            "prefilled_data": {},
54        }
55
56    def get_samples_dir(self) -> Path:
57        return self.session_samples_dir if self.session_samples_dir is not None else self.samples_dir
58
59    def get_annotations_file(self) -> Path:
60        return self.annotations_file
61
62    def set_annotations_file(self, path: Path) -> Path:
63        resolved_path = path.resolve()
64        self.annotations_file = resolved_path
65        self.session_state["annotations_file"] = str(resolved_path)
66        return resolved_path
AnnotatorRuntime(samples_dir: pathlib.Path, annotations_file: pathlib.Path) 
33    def __init__(self, samples_dir: Path, annotations_file: Path) -> None:
34        self.samples_dir = samples_dir.resolve()
35        self.annotations_file = annotations_file.resolve()
36        self._reset_state()
samples_dir
annotations_file
def get_samples_dir(self) -> pathlib.Path: 
56    def get_samples_dir(self) -> Path:
57        return self.session_samples_dir if self.session_samples_dir is not None else self.samples_dir
def get_annotations_file(self) -> pathlib.Path: 
59    def get_annotations_file(self) -> Path:
60        return self.annotations_file
def set_annotations_file(self, path: pathlib.Path) -> pathlib.Path: 
62    def set_annotations_file(self, path: Path) -> Path:
63        resolved_path = path.resolve()
64        self.annotations_file = resolved_path
65        self.session_state["annotations_file"] = str(resolved_path)
66        return resolved_path
def get_runtime() -> AnnotatorRuntime: 
69def get_runtime() -> AnnotatorRuntime:
70    runtime = app.extensions.get("annotator_runtime")
71    if isinstance(runtime, AnnotatorRuntime):
72        return runtime
73
74    runtime = AnnotatorRuntime(
75        samples_dir=Path("samples"),
76        annotations_file=DEFAULT_ANNOTATIONS_FILE,
77    )
78    app.extensions["annotator_runtime"] = runtime
79    return runtime
def configure_runtime( samples_dir: pathlib.Path) -> AnnotatorRuntime: 
82def configure_runtime(samples_dir: Path) -> AnnotatorRuntime:
83    runtime = get_runtime()
84    runtime.samples_dir = samples_dir.resolve()
85    runtime._reset_state()
86    return runtime
def get_samples_dir() -> pathlib.Path: 
89def get_samples_dir() -> Path:
90    return get_runtime().get_samples_dir()
def get_annotations_file() -> pathlib.Path: 
93def get_annotations_file() -> Path:
94    return get_runtime().get_annotations_file()
def set_annotations_file(path: pathlib.Path) -> pathlib.Path: 
97def set_annotations_file(path: Path) -> Path:
98    return get_runtime().set_annotations_file(path)
class AnnotationService: 
122class AnnotationService:
123    def load_annotations(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
124        annotations_file = get_annotations_file()
125        if annotations_file.exists():
126            try:
127                loaded = json.loads(annotations_file.read_text())
128                if isinstance(loaded, dict):
129                    # Convert slash-separated keys to internal __ format
130                    return {k.replace("/", "__"): v for k, v in loaded.items()}
131            except json.JSONDecodeError:
132                return {}
133        return {}
134
135    def save_annotations(self, annotations: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
136        # Convert internal __ keys to slash-separated directory/trajectory_id format
137        file_annotations = {k.replace("__", "/"): v for k, v in annotations.items()}
138        get_annotations_file().write_text(json.dumps(file_annotations, indent=2, sort_keys=True))
139
140    def get_samples(self) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
141        samples: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
142        annotations = self.load_annotations()
143
144        for sample in _build_sample_index().values():
145            sample_annotations = _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample, annotations)
146            annotator_names = list(sample_annotations.keys())
147
148            human_annotators = [
149                name for name in annotator_names
150                if sample_annotations.get(name, {}).get("source") != "vlm"
151            ]
152            vlm_annotators = [
153                name for name in annotator_names
154                if sample_annotations.get(name, {}).get("source") == "vlm"
155            ]
156
157            samples.append({
158                "id": sample["id"],
159                "display_name": sample.get("display_name", sample["id"]),
160                "subdirectory": sample.get("subdirectory", ""),
161                "annotators": annotator_names,
162                "human_annotators": human_annotators,
163                "vlm_annotators": vlm_annotators,
164                "annotation_count": len(annotator_names),
165                "has_human_annotation": len(human_annotators) > 0,
166                "has_vlm_annotation": len(vlm_annotators) > 0,
167                "metadata": sample["metadata"],
168            })
169
170        return samples
171
172    def initialize_session_annotations(self, annotations_file: Path | None = None) -> Path:
173        if annotations_file is not None:
174            annotations_path = annotations_file.resolve()
175        else:
176            annotations_path = get_samples_dir().resolve() / "annotations.json"
177        annotations_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
178        set_annotations_file(annotations_path)
179
180        if not annotations_path.exists():
181            self.save_annotations(_h5_annotations_snapshot())
182
183        return annotations_path
184
185    def get_sample_entry(self, sample_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
186        return _build_sample_index().get(sample_id)
187
188    def get_annotations_for_sample(self, sample_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
189        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
190        if sample_entry is None:
191            return {}
192        annotations = self.load_annotations()
193        return _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample_entry, annotations)
194
195    def get_annotation_for_annotator(self, sample_id: str, annotator_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
196        sample_annotations = self.get_annotations_for_sample(sample_id)
197        annotation = sample_annotations.get(annotator_name, {})
198        return annotation if isinstance(annotation, dict) else {}
199
200    def save_sample_annotation(self, sample_id: str, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
201        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator", "")).strip()
202        if not annotator_name:
203            return {"error": "Annotator name is required"}, 400
204
205        reserved = {"annotator", "annotated_at", "source", "__metadata"}
206        annotation = {k: v for k, v in data.items() if k not in reserved}
207        annotation.update({
208            "annotated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
209            "annotator": annotator_name,
210            "source": "human",
211        })
212
213        with _annotations_lock:
214            annotations = self.load_annotations()
215            annotations.setdefault(sample_id, {})[annotator_name] = annotation
216            self.save_annotations(annotations)
217
218        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
219        if sample_entry is not None:
220            metadata_updates = data.get("__metadata", {})
221            if isinstance(metadata_updates, dict):
222                _write_metadata_to_h5(sample_entry, metadata_updates)
223            _write_annotation_to_h5(sample_entry, annotation, annotator_name)
224
225        return {"status": "saved", "annotation": annotation}, 200
226
227    def save_batch_metadata(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
228        subdirectory = data.get("subdirectory", "")
229        metadata_updates = data.get("metadata", {})
230
231        if not isinstance(subdirectory, str):
232            return {"error": "subdirectory must be a string"}, 400
233        if not isinstance(metadata_updates, dict):
234            return {"error": "metadata must be an object"}, 400
235
236        allowed_keys = {"policy_id", "lab_id", "operator_name", "robot_id", "control_freq"}
237        filtered_metadata = {
238            key: value
239            for key, value in metadata_updates.items()
240            if key in allowed_keys
241        }
242        if not filtered_metadata:
243            return {"error": "No batch metadata fields were provided"}, 400
244
245        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
246        target_samples = [
247            sample
248            for sample in sample_index.values()
249            if str(sample.get("subdirectory", "")) == subdirectory
250        ]
251
252        writable_samples = [
253            sample
254            for sample in target_samples
255            if isinstance(sample.get("h5_path"), Path)
256        ]
257
258        for sample in writable_samples:
259            _write_metadata_to_h5(sample, filtered_metadata)
260
261        return {
262            "status": "saved",
263            "subdirectory": subdirectory,
264            "selected_fields": sorted(filtered_metadata.keys()),
265            "total_in_subdirectory": len(target_samples),
266            "updated_h5_samples": len(writable_samples),
267        }, 200
268
269    def list_annotators(self) -> list[str]:
270        annotations = self.load_annotations()
271        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
272        annotators: set[str] = set()
273        for sample in sample_index.values():
274            sample_annotations = _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample, annotations)
275            annotators.update(sample_annotations.keys())
276        return sorted(annotators)
277
278    def accept_vlm_annotation(self, sample_id: str, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
279        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator", "")).strip()
280        vlm_annotator = str(data.get("vlm_annotator", "")).strip()
281
282        if not annotator_name:
283            return {"error": "Human annotator name is required"}, 400
284
285        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
286        if sample_entry is None:
287            return {"error": "Sample not found"}, 404
288
289        with _annotations_lock:
290            annotations = self.load_annotations()
291            sample_annotations = _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample_entry, annotations)
292
293            vlm_ann: dict[str, Any] | None = None
294            if vlm_annotator and vlm_annotator in sample_annotations:
295                candidate = sample_annotations[vlm_annotator]
296                if isinstance(candidate, dict):
297                    vlm_ann = candidate
298            else:
299                for name, ann in sample_annotations.items():
300                    if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm":
301                        vlm_ann = ann
302                        vlm_annotator = name
303                        break
304
305            if not vlm_ann:
306                return {"error": "No VLM annotation found"}, 404
307
308            human_ann = {
309                "failure_category": data.get("failure_category", vlm_ann.get("failure_category", "")),
310                "failure_description": data.get("failure_description", vlm_ann.get("failure_description", "")),
311                "would_retry": data.get("would_retry", vlm_ann.get("would_retry", "")),
312                "additional_notes": data.get("additional_notes", vlm_ann.get("additional_notes", "")),
313                "annotated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
314                "annotator": annotator_name,
315                "source": "vlm_accepted",
316                "vlm_source": vlm_annotator,
317            }
318
319            annotations.setdefault(sample_id, {})[annotator_name] = human_ann
320            self.save_annotations(annotations)
321
322        _write_annotation_to_h5(sample_entry, human_ann, annotator_name)
323
324        return {"status": "accepted", "annotation": human_ann}, 200
325
326    def get_overview_payload(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
327        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
328        annotations = self.load_annotations()
329        merged_by_sample = {
330            sid: _merged_annotations_for_sample(entry, annotations)
331            for sid, entry in sample_index.items()
332        }
333
334        human_annotators: set[str] = set()
335        vlm_annotators: set[str] = set()
336        for sample_anns in merged_by_sample.values():
337            for name, ann in sample_anns.items():
338                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm":
339                    vlm_annotators.add(name)
340                else:
341                    human_annotators.add(name)
342        all_annotators = sorted(human_annotators) + sorted(vlm_annotators)
343
344        overview_samples: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
345        agreement_count = 0
346        disagreement_count = 0
347        multi_annotated = 0
348        human_soft_sum = 0.0
349        human_soft_count = 0
350        vlm_human_samples = 0
351        vlm_human_agreement = 0
352        vlm_human_disagreement = 0
353        vlm_human_soft_sum = 0.0
354        vlm_human_soft_count = 0
355
356        for sid, sample_entry in sample_index.items():
357            sample_anns = merged_by_sample[sid]
358
359            human_anns = {
360                name: ann for name, ann in sample_anns.items()
361                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") != "vlm"
362            }
363            vlm_anns = {
364                name: ann for name, ann in sample_anns.items()
365                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm"
366            }
367
368            has_disagreement = False
369            if len(human_anns) >= 2:
370                multi_annotated += 1
371                cats = [_category_set(a) for a in human_anns.values()]
372                retries = [a.get("would_retry", "") for a in human_anns.values()]
373
374                if len(set(map(frozenset, cats))) > 1 or len(set(retries)) > 1:
375                    has_disagreement = True
376                    disagreement_count += 1
377                else:
378                    agreement_count += 1
379
380            human_soft_agreement: float | None = None
381            if len(human_anns) >= 2:
382                sims: list[float] = []
383                human_values = list(human_anns.values())
384                for i in range(len(human_values)):
385                    for j in range(i + 1, len(human_values)):
386                        sims.append(_soft_similarity(human_values[i], human_values[j]))
387                if sims:
388                    human_soft_agreement = sum(sims) / len(sims)
389                    human_soft_sum += human_soft_agreement
390                    human_soft_count += 1
391
392            vlm_human_soft_agreement: float | None = None
393            vlm_human_strict_match = False
394            if human_anns and vlm_anns:
395                vlm_human_samples += 1
396                sims = []
397                for h in human_anns.values():
398                    for v in vlm_anns.values():
399                        sims.append(_soft_similarity(h, v))
400                        if _strict_match(h, v):
401                            vlm_human_strict_match = True
402                if sims:
403                    vlm_human_soft_agreement = sum(sims) / len(sims)
404                    vlm_human_soft_sum += vlm_human_soft_agreement
405                    vlm_human_soft_count += 1
406                if vlm_human_strict_match:
407                    vlm_human_agreement += 1
408                else:
409                    vlm_human_disagreement += 1
410
411            overview_samples.append({
412                "id": sid,
413                "metadata": sample_entry["metadata"],
414                "annotations": sample_anns,
415                "annotator_count": len(sample_anns),
416                "human_annotator_count": len(human_anns),
417                "vlm_annotator_count": len(vlm_anns),
418                "has_vlm_annotation": len(vlm_anns) > 0,
419                "human_soft_agreement": human_soft_agreement,
420                "vlm_human_soft_agreement": vlm_human_soft_agreement,
421                "vlm_human_strict_match": vlm_human_strict_match,
422                "has_disagreement": has_disagreement,
423            })
424
425        return {
426            "samples": overview_samples,
427            "annotators": all_annotators,
428            "human_annotators": sorted(human_annotators),
429            "vlm_annotators": sorted(vlm_annotators),
430            "stats": {
431                "total_samples": len(sample_index),
432                "multi_annotated": multi_annotated,
433                "agreement": agreement_count,
434                "disagreement": disagreement_count,
435                "human_soft_agreement_avg": (human_soft_sum / human_soft_count) if human_soft_count else None,
436                "vlm_human_samples": vlm_human_samples,
437                "vlm_human_agreement": vlm_human_agreement,
438                "vlm_human_disagreement": vlm_human_disagreement,
439                "vlm_human_soft_agreement_avg": (vlm_human_soft_sum / vlm_human_soft_count) if vlm_human_soft_count else None,
440            },
441        }
def load_annotations(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
123    def load_annotations(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
124        annotations_file = get_annotations_file()
125        if annotations_file.exists():
126            try:
127                loaded = json.loads(annotations_file.read_text())
128                if isinstance(loaded, dict):
129                    # Convert slash-separated keys to internal __ format
130                    return {k.replace("/", "__"): v for k, v in loaded.items()}
131            except json.JSONDecodeError:
132                return {}
133        return {}
def save_annotations(self, annotations: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> None: 
135    def save_annotations(self, annotations: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
136        # Convert internal __ keys to slash-separated directory/trajectory_id format
137        file_annotations = {k.replace("__", "/"): v for k, v in annotations.items()}
138        get_annotations_file().write_text(json.dumps(file_annotations, indent=2, sort_keys=True))

146            annotator_names = list(sample_annotations.keys())
147
148            human_annotators = [

152            vlm_annotators = [

def initialize_session_annotations(self, annotations_file: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> pathlib.Path:

173        if annotations_file is not None:

def get_sample_entry(self, sample_id: str) -> dict[str, typing.Any] | None: 
185    def get_sample_entry(self, sample_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
186        return _build_sample_index().get(sample_id)
def get_annotations_for_sample(self, sample_id: str) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
188    def get_annotations_for_sample(self, sample_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
189        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
190        if sample_entry is None:
191            return {}

def get_annotation_for_annotator(self, sample_id: str, annotator_name: str) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
195    def get_annotation_for_annotator(self, sample_id: str, annotator_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
196        sample_annotations = self.get_annotations_for_sample(sample_id)
