def save_sample_annotation( self, sample_id: str, data: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, typing.Any], int]: 
200    def save_sample_annotation(self, sample_id: str, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
201        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator", "")).strip()
202        if not annotator_name:
203            return {"error": "Annotator name is required"}, 400
204
205        reserved = {"annotator", "annotated_at", "source", "__metadata"}
206        annotation = {k: v for k, v in data.items() if k not in reserved}
207        annotation.update({
208            "annotated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
209            "annotator": annotator_name,
210            "source": "human",
211        })
212
213        with _annotations_lock:
214            annotations = self.load_annotations()
215            annotations.setdefault(sample_id, {})[annotator_name] = annotation
216            self.save_annotations(annotations)
217
218        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
219        if sample_entry is not None:
220            metadata_updates = data.get("__metadata", {})
221            if isinstance(metadata_updates, dict):
222                _write_metadata_to_h5(sample_entry, metadata_updates)
223            _write_annotation_to_h5(sample_entry, annotation, annotator_name)
224
225        return {"status": "saved", "annotation": annotation}, 200
def save_batch_metadata(self, data: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, typing.Any], int]: 
227    def save_batch_metadata(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
228        subdirectory = data.get("subdirectory", "")
229        metadata_updates = data.get("metadata", {})
230
231        if not isinstance(subdirectory, str):
232            return {"error": "subdirectory must be a string"}, 400
233        if not isinstance(metadata_updates, dict):
234            return {"error": "metadata must be an object"}, 400
235
236        allowed_keys = {"policy_id", "lab_id", "operator_name", "robot_id", "control_freq"}
237        filtered_metadata = {
238            key: value
239            for key, value in metadata_updates.items()
240            if key in allowed_keys
241        }
242        if not filtered_metadata:
243            return {"error": "No batch metadata fields were provided"}, 400
244
245        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
246        target_samples = [
247            sample
248            for sample in sample_index.values()
249            if str(sample.get("subdirectory", "")) == subdirectory
250        ]
251
252        writable_samples = [
253            sample
254            for sample in target_samples
255            if isinstance(sample.get("h5_path"), Path)
256        ]
257
258        for sample in writable_samples:
259            _write_metadata_to_h5(sample, filtered_metadata)
260
261        return {
262            "status": "saved",
263            "subdirectory": subdirectory,
264            "selected_fields": sorted(filtered_metadata.keys()),
265            "total_in_subdirectory": len(target_samples),
266            "updated_h5_samples": len(writable_samples),
267        }, 200
def list_annotators(self) -> list[str]: 
269    def list_annotators(self) -> list[str]:
270        annotations = self.load_annotations()
271        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
272        annotators: set[str] = set()
273        for sample in sample_index.values():
274            sample_annotations = _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample, annotations)
275            annotators.update(sample_annotations.keys())
276        return sorted(annotators)
def accept_vlm_annotation( self, sample_id: str, data: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, typing.Any], int]: 
278    def accept_vlm_annotation(self, sample_id: str, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
279        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator", "")).strip()
280        vlm_annotator = str(data.get("vlm_annotator", "")).strip()
281
282        if not annotator_name:
283            return {"error": "Human annotator name is required"}, 400
284
285        sample_entry = self.get_sample_entry(sample_id)
286        if sample_entry is None:
287            return {"error": "Sample not found"}, 404
288
289        with _annotations_lock:
290            annotations = self.load_annotations()
291            sample_annotations = _merged_annotations_for_sample(sample_entry, annotations)
292
293            vlm_ann: dict[str, Any] | None = None
294            if vlm_annotator and vlm_annotator in sample_annotations:
295                candidate = sample_annotations[vlm_annotator]
296                if isinstance(candidate, dict):
297                    vlm_ann = candidate
298            else:
299                for name, ann in sample_annotations.items():
300                    if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm":
301                        vlm_ann = ann
302                        vlm_annotator = name
303                        break
304
305            if not vlm_ann:
306                return {"error": "No VLM annotation found"}, 404
307
308            human_ann = {
309                "failure_category": data.get("failure_category", vlm_ann.get("failure_category", "")),
310                "failure_description": data.get("failure_description", vlm_ann.get("failure_description", "")),
311                "would_retry": data.get("would_retry", vlm_ann.get("would_retry", "")),
312                "additional_notes": data.get("additional_notes", vlm_ann.get("additional_notes", "")),
313                "annotated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
314                "annotator": annotator_name,
315                "source": "vlm_accepted",
316                "vlm_source": vlm_annotator,
317            }
318
319            annotations.setdefault(sample_id, {})[annotator_name] = human_ann
320            self.save_annotations(annotations)
321
322        _write_annotation_to_h5(sample_entry, human_ann, annotator_name)
323
324        return {"status": "accepted", "annotation": human_ann}, 200
def get_overview_payload(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
326    def get_overview_payload(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
327        sample_index = _build_sample_index()
328        annotations = self.load_annotations()
329        merged_by_sample = {
330            sid: _merged_annotations_for_sample(entry, annotations)
331            for sid, entry in sample_index.items()
332        }
333
334        human_annotators: set[str] = set()
335        vlm_annotators: set[str] = set()
336        for sample_anns in merged_by_sample.values():
337            for name, ann in sample_anns.items():
338                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm":
339                    vlm_annotators.add(name)
340                else:
341                    human_annotators.add(name)
342        all_annotators = sorted(human_annotators) + sorted(vlm_annotators)
343
344        overview_samples: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
345        agreement_count = 0
346        disagreement_count = 0
347        multi_annotated = 0
348        human_soft_sum = 0.0
349        human_soft_count = 0
350        vlm_human_samples = 0
351        vlm_human_agreement = 0
352        vlm_human_disagreement = 0
353        vlm_human_soft_sum = 0.0
354        vlm_human_soft_count = 0
355
356        for sid, sample_entry in sample_index.items():
357            sample_anns = merged_by_sample[sid]
358
359            human_anns = {
360                name: ann for name, ann in sample_anns.items()
361                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") != "vlm"
362            }
363            vlm_anns = {
364                name: ann for name, ann in sample_anns.items()
365                if isinstance(ann, dict) and ann.get("source") == "vlm"
366            }
367
368            has_disagreement = False
369            if len(human_anns) >= 2:
370                multi_annotated += 1
371                cats = [_category_set(a) for a in human_anns.values()]
372                retries = [a.get("would_retry", "") for a in human_anns.values()]
373
374                if len(set(map(frozenset, cats))) > 1 or len(set(retries)) > 1:
375                    has_disagreement = True
376                    disagreement_count += 1
377                else:
378                    agreement_count += 1
379
380            human_soft_agreement: float | None = None
381            if len(human_anns) >= 2:
382                sims: list[float] = []
383                human_values = list(human_anns.values())
384                for i in range(len(human_values)):
385                    for j in range(i + 1, len(human_values)):
386                        sims.append(_soft_similarity(human_values[i], human_values[j]))
387                if sims:
388                    human_soft_agreement = sum(sims) / len(sims)
389                    human_soft_sum += human_soft_agreement
390                    human_soft_count += 1
391
392            vlm_human_soft_agreement: float | None = None
393            vlm_human_strict_match = False
394            if human_anns and vlm_anns:
395                vlm_human_samples += 1
396                sims = []
397                for h in human_anns.values():
398                    for v in vlm_anns.values():
399                        sims.append(_soft_similarity(h, v))
400                        if _strict_match(h, v):
401                            vlm_human_strict_match = True
402                if sims:
403                    vlm_human_soft_agreement = sum(sims) / len(sims)
404                    vlm_human_soft_sum += vlm_human_soft_agreement
405                    vlm_human_soft_count += 1
406                if vlm_human_strict_match:
407                    vlm_human_agreement += 1
408                else:
409                    vlm_human_disagreement += 1
410
411            overview_samples.append({
412                "id": sid,
413                "metadata": sample_entry["metadata"],
414                "annotations": sample_anns,
415                "annotator_count": len(sample_anns),
416                "human_annotator_count": len(human_anns),
417                "vlm_annotator_count": len(vlm_anns),
418                "has_vlm_annotation": len(vlm_anns) > 0,
419                "human_soft_agreement": human_soft_agreement,
420                "vlm_human_soft_agreement": vlm_human_soft_agreement,
421                "vlm_human_strict_match": vlm_human_strict_match,
422                "has_disagreement": has_disagreement,
423            })
424
425        return {
426            "samples": overview_samples,
427            "annotators": all_annotators,
428            "human_annotators": sorted(human_annotators),
429            "vlm_annotators": sorted(vlm_annotators),
430            "stats": {
431                "total_samples": len(sample_index),
432                "multi_annotated": multi_annotated,
433                "agreement": agreement_count,
434                "disagreement": disagreement_count,
435                "human_soft_agreement_avg": (human_soft_sum / human_soft_count) if human_soft_count else None,
436                "vlm_human_samples": vlm_human_samples,
437                "vlm_human_agreement": vlm_human_agreement,
438                "vlm_human_disagreement": vlm_human_disagreement,
439                "vlm_human_soft_agreement_avg": (vlm_human_soft_sum / vlm_human_soft_count) if vlm_human_soft_count else None,
440            },
441        }
class RuntimeService: 
444class RuntimeService:
445    def get_task_state(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
446        return get_runtime().task_state
447
448    def submit_task(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
449        runtime = get_runtime()
450        runtime.task_state["pending_instruction"] = data.get("instruction", "")
451        runtime.task_state["status"] = "pending"
452        return {"status": "ok"}
453
454    def start_task(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
455        runtime = get_runtime()
456        instruction = data.get("instruction", runtime.task_state.get("pending_instruction", ""))
457        runtime.task_state["last_instruction"] = instruction
458        runtime.task_state["pending_instruction"] = None
459        runtime.task_state["status"] = "running"
460        return {"status": "ok"}
461
462    def set_task_annotating(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
463        runtime = get_runtime()
464        runtime.task_state["current_sample_idx"] = data.get("sample_idx")
465        runtime.task_state["status"] = "annotating"
466        return {"status": "ok"}
467
468    def mark_task_done(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
469        runtime = get_runtime()
470        runtime.task_state["status"] = "idle"
471        runtime.task_state["current_sample_idx"] = None
472        return {"status": "ok"}
473
474    def get_session_state(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
475        return get_runtime().session_state
476
477    def create_session(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
478        runtime = get_runtime()
479        if runtime.session_state["configured"]:
480            return {"error": "Session already configured. Restart to start a new session."}, 409
481
482        policy_id = str(data.get("policy_id", "")).strip()
483        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator_name", "")).strip()
484        raw_camera_names = data.get("camera_names", [])
485        camera_names = [c.strip() for c in raw_camera_names if isinstance(c, str) and c.strip()]
486
487        if not policy_id:
488            return {"error": "policy_id is required"}, 400
489        if not annotator_name:
490            return {"error": "annotator_name is required"}, 400
491        if not camera_names:
492            return {"error": "at least one camera name is required"}, 400
493
494        ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
495        safe_annotator = "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_" else "_" for c in annotator_name)
496        safe_policy = "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_" else "_" for c in policy_id)
497        dir_name = f"{ts}_{safe_annotator}_{safe_policy}"
498        session_dir = runtime.samples_dir / dir_name
499        session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
500
501        runtime.session_samples_dir = session_dir
502        session_annotations_path = get_annotation_service().initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file=session_dir / "annotations.json")
503        runtime.session_state.update({
504            "configured": True,
505            "policy_id": policy_id,
506            "annotator_name": annotator_name,
507            "camera_names": camera_names,
508            "session_dir": str(session_dir),
509            "annotations_file": str(session_annotations_path),
510            "prefilled_data": {},
511        })
512        return {
513            "status": "created",
514            "session_dir": str(session_dir),
515            "annotations_file": str(session_annotations_path),
516        }, 200
517
518    def prefill_session(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
519        runtime = get_runtime()
520        if runtime.session_state["configured"]:
521            return {"status": "already_configured"}
522
523        runtime.session_state["prefilled_data"] = {
524            "policy_id": data.get("policy_id", ""),
525            "camera_names": data.get("camera_names", []),
526        }
527        return {"status": "prefilled"}
def get_task_state(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
445    def get_task_state(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
446        return get_runtime().task_state
def submit_task(self, data: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
448    def submit_task(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
449        runtime = get_runtime()
450        runtime.task_state["pending_instruction"] = data.get("instruction", "")
451        runtime.task_state["status"] = "pending"
452        return {"status": "ok"}
def start_task(self, data: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
454    def start_task(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
455        runtime = get_runtime()
456        instruction = data.get("instruction", runtime.task_state.get("pending_instruction", ""))
457        runtime.task_state["last_instruction"] = instruction
458        runtime.task_state["pending_instruction"] = None
459        runtime.task_state["status"] = "running"
460        return {"status": "ok"}
def set_task_annotating(self, data: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
462    def set_task_annotating(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
463        runtime = get_runtime()
464        runtime.task_state["current_sample_idx"] = data.get("sample_idx")
465        runtime.task_state["status"] = "annotating"
466        return {"status": "ok"}
def mark_task_done(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
468    def mark_task_done(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
469        runtime = get_runtime()
470        runtime.task_state["status"] = "idle"
471        runtime.task_state["current_sample_idx"] = None
472        return {"status": "ok"}
def get_session_state(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
474    def get_session_state(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
475        return get_runtime().session_state
def create_session(self, data: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, typing.Any], int]: 
477    def create_session(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int]:
478        runtime = get_runtime()
479        if runtime.session_state["configured"]:
480            return {"error": "Session already configured. Restart to start a new session."}, 409
481
482        policy_id = str(data.get("policy_id", "")).strip()
483        annotator_name = str(data.get("annotator_name", "")).strip()
484        raw_camera_names = data.get("camera_names", [])
485        camera_names = [c.strip() for c in raw_camera_names if isinstance(c, str) and c.strip()]
486
487        if not policy_id:
488            return {"error": "policy_id is required"}, 400
489        if not annotator_name:
490            return {"error": "annotator_name is required"}, 400
491        if not camera_names:
492            return {"error": "at least one camera name is required"}, 400
493
494        ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
495        safe_annotator = "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_" else "_" for c in annotator_name)
496        safe_policy = "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_" else "_" for c in policy_id)
497        dir_name = f"{ts}_{safe_annotator}_{safe_policy}"
498        session_dir = runtime.samples_dir / dir_name
499        session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
500
501        runtime.session_samples_dir = session_dir
502        session_annotations_path = get_annotation_service().initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file=session_dir / "annotations.json")
503        runtime.session_state.update({
504            "configured": True,
505            "policy_id": policy_id,
506            "annotator_name": annotator_name,
507            "camera_names": camera_names,
508            "session_dir": str(session_dir),
509            "annotations_file": str(session_annotations_path),
510            "prefilled_data": {},
511        })
512        return {
513            "status": "created",
514            "session_dir": str(session_dir),
515            "annotations_file": str(session_annotations_path),
516        }, 200
def prefill_session(self, data: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
518    def prefill_session(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
519        runtime = get_runtime()
520        if runtime.session_state["configured"]:
521            return {"status": "already_configured"}
522
523        runtime.session_state["prefilled_data"] = {
524            "policy_id": data.get("policy_id", ""),
525            "camera_names": data.get("camera_names", []),
526        }
527        return {"status": "prefilled"}
def get_annotation_service() -> AnnotationService: 
530def get_annotation_service() -> AnnotationService:
531    service = app.extensions.get("annotation_service")
532    if isinstance(service, AnnotationService):
533        return service
534
535    service = AnnotationService()
536    app.extensions["annotation_service"] = service
537    return service
def get_runtime_service() -> RuntimeService: 
540def get_runtime_service() -> RuntimeService:
541    service = app.extensions.get("runtime_service")
542    if isinstance(service, RuntimeService):
543        return service
544
545    service = RuntimeService()
546    app.extensions["runtime_service"] = service
547    return service
def initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> pathlib.Path: 
842def initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file: Path | None = None) -> Path:
843    return get_annotation_service().initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file=annotations_file)
def load_questionnaire() -> dict: 
905def load_questionnaire() -> dict:
906    """Load questionnaire configuration from YAML."""
907    if QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.exists():
908        return yaml.safe_load(QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.read_text())
909    return {"title": "Annotation", "questions": []}

Load questionnaire configuration from YAML.

@app.route('/api/samples/<sample_id>')
def api_sample(sample_id: str): 
951@app.route("/api/samples/<sample_id>")
952def api_sample(sample_id: str):
953    """Get sample metadata and video URLs for all views."""
954    sample_entry = _build_sample_index().get(sample_id)
955    if sample_entry is None:
956        return jsonify({"error": "Sample not found"}), 404
957
958    metadata = sample_entry.get("metadata", {})
959    video_urls = sample_entry.get("video_urls", {})
960
961    return jsonify({
962        "id": sample_id,

964        "metadata": metadata,
965    })

@app.route('/api/questionnaire/raw')
def api_questionnaire_raw(): 
974@app.route("/api/questionnaire/raw")
975def api_questionnaire_raw():
976    """Get raw YAML content for editing."""
977    if QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.exists():
978        return QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.read_text(), 200, {"Content-Type": "text/plain"}
979    return "", 200, {"Content-Type": "text/plain"}

Get raw YAML content for editing.

@app.route('/api/questionnaire/raw', methods=['POST'])
def api_questionnaire_save(): 
982@app.route("/api/questionnaire/raw", methods=["POST"])
983def api_questionnaire_save():
984    """Save questionnaire YAML content."""
985    content = request.data.decode("utf-8")
986    # Validate YAML syntax
987    try:
988        parsed = yaml.safe_load(content)
989        if not isinstance(parsed, dict):
990            return jsonify({"error": "YAML must be a dictionary with 'title' and 'questions' keys"}), 400
991    except yaml.YAMLError as e:
992        return jsonify({"error": f"Invalid YAML: {e}"}), 400
993
994    QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH.write_text(content)
995    return jsonify({"status": "saved"})

Save questionnaire YAML content.

@app.route('/api/annotations/<sample_id>/accept-vlm', methods=['POST'])
def api_accept_vlm_annotation(sample_id: str): 
1040@app.route("/api/annotations/<sample_id>/accept-vlm", methods=["POST"])
1041def api_accept_vlm_annotation(sample_id: str):

Accept VLM annotation and save under human annotator name.

@app.route('/videos/<filename>')
def serve_video(filename: str): 
1047@app.route("/videos/<filename>")
1048def serve_video(filename: str):
1049    """Serve video files."""
1050    if filename.lower().endswith(".mp4"):
1051        return send_from_directory(get_samples_dir(), filename, mimetype="video/mp4")
1052    return send_from_directory(get_samples_dir(), filename)

Serve video files.

@app.route('/videos-path/<path:video_path>')
def serve_video_by_path(video_path: str): 
1055@app.route("/videos-path/<path:video_path>")
1056def serve_video_by_path(video_path: str):
1057    """Serve videos addressed by path relative to samples directory."""
1058    samples_root = get_samples_dir().resolve()
1059    target_path = (samples_root / video_path).resolve()
1060
1061    try:
1062        target_path.relative_to(samples_root)
1063    except ValueError:
1064        abort(403)
1065
1066    if not target_path.exists() or not target_path.is_file():
1067        abort(404)
1068
1069    if target_path.suffix.lower() == ".mp4":
1070        return send_file(target_path, mimetype="video/mp4")
1071    return send_file(target_path)

Serve videos addressed by path relative to samples directory.

def overview(): 
1074@app.route("/overview")
1075def overview():
1076    """Serve the annotation overview/comparison page."""
1077    return OVERVIEW_HTML
