Browser submits a new task instruction.

@app.route('/api/task/start', methods=['POST'])
def api_task_start(): 
1108@app.route("/api/task/start", methods=["POST"])
1109def api_task_start():
1110    """Script confirms it has picked up the task and is starting the rollout."""
1111    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().start_task(_json_payload()))

Script confirms it has picked up the task and is starting the rollout.

@app.route('/api/task/annotating', methods=['POST'])
def api_task_annotating(): 
1114@app.route("/api/task/annotating", methods=["POST"])
1115def api_task_annotating():
1116    """Script signals rollout is done and annotation is needed."""
1117    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().set_task_annotating(_json_payload()))

Script signals rollout is done and annotation is needed.

@app.route('/api/task/done', methods=['POST'])
def api_task_done(): 
1120@app.route("/api/task/done", methods=["POST"])
1121def api_task_done():
1122    """Script signals annotation is complete and we're ready for the next task."""
1123    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().mark_task_done())

Script signals annotation is complete and we're ready for the next task.

@app.route('/api/session', methods=['GET'])
def api_session_get(): 
1126@app.route("/api/session", methods=["GET"])
1127def api_session_get():
1128    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().get_session_state())
@app.route('/api/session', methods=['POST'])
def api_session_create(): 
1131@app.route("/api/session", methods=["POST"])
1132def api_session_create():
1133    payload, status = get_runtime_service().create_session(_json_payload())
1134    return jsonify(payload), status
@app.route('/api/session/prefill', methods=['POST'])
def api_session_prefill(): 
1137@app.route("/api/session/prefill", methods=["POST"])
1138def api_session_prefill():
1139    return jsonify(get_runtime_service().prefill_session(_json_payload()))
TEMPLATE_DIR = PosixPath('/repo/robotic_failure_data/annotation_tool/templates')
TASK_HTML = '<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang="en">\n<head>\n <meta charset="UTF-8">\n <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">\n <title>Task Setup</title>\n <style>\n * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }\n body {\n font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \'Segoe UI\', Roboto, sans-serif;\n background: #1a1a2e;\n color: #eee;\n min-height: 100vh;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n }\n .card {\n background: #16213e;\n border-radius: 12px;\n padding: 40px;\n width: 620px;\n max-width: 92vw;\n }\n .card-header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n margin-bottom: 32px;\n }\n h1 { font-size: 1.4rem; }\n .header-links a {\n color: #60a5fa;\n text-decoration: none;\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n }\n .header-links a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }\n .status-badge {\n display: inline-block;\n padding: 3px 12px;\n border-radius: 20px;\n font-size: 0.78rem;\n font-weight: 600;\n margin-bottom: 24px;\n }\n .s-idle { background: #1e3a5f; color: #60a5fa; }\n .s-pending,\n .s-running { background: #713f12; color: #fbbf24; }\n .s-annotating { background: #14532d; color: #4ade80; }\n label {\n display: block;\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n color: #94a3b8;\n margin-bottom: 8px;\n }\n textarea {\n width: 100%;\n padding: 12px;\n border: 1px solid #333;\n border-radius: 6px;\n background: #1a1a2e;\n color: #fff;\n font-size: 1rem;\n resize: vertical;\n min-height: 90px;\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: #60a5fa; }\n .btn-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 16px; }\n button {\n padding: 11px 22px;\n border: none;\n border-radius: 6px;\n font-size: 0.95rem;\n cursor: pointer;\n transition: background 0.15s;\n }\n .btn-start { background: #4ade80; color: #000; font-weight: 600; }\n .btn-start:hover { background: #22c55e; }\n .btn-repeat { background: transparent; color: #60a5fa; border: 1px solid #60a5fa; }\n .btn-repeat:hover { background: #1e3a5f; }\n .spinner-wrap { text-align: center; padding: 24px 0; }\n .spinner {\n width: 44px; height: 44px;\n border: 4px solid #333;\n border-top-color: #4ade80;\n border-radius: 50%;\n animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;\n margin: 0 auto 18px;\n }\n @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }\n .spinner-wrap .label { color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 0.9rem; }\n .spinner-wrap .task-text {\n color: #eee;\n font-style: italic;\n font-size: 1rem;\n max-width: 480px;\n margin: 0 auto;\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n .hint { color: #555; font-size: 0.78rem; margin-top: 10px; }\n .form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }\n .form-group label { display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 8px; }\n .form-group input[type="text"] {\n width: 100%;\n padding: 10px;\n border: 1px solid #333;\n border-radius: 6px;\n background: #1a1a2e;\n color: #fff;\n font-size: 0.95rem;\n }\n .camera-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }\n .camera-row input { flex: 1; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 4px; background: #1a1a2e; color: #fff; font-size: 0.9rem; }\n .camera-row button { padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: #444; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; }\n .btn-add-cam { background: transparent; color: #60a5fa; border: 1px solid #60a5fa; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 12px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85rem; }\n .btn-add-cam:hover { background: #1e3a5f; }\n </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n <div class="card">\n <div class="card-header">\n <h1>Task Setup</h1>\n <div class="header-links">\n <a href="/">Annotation Tool</a>\n </div>\n </div>\n\n <!-- Session setup (shown once at startup) -->\n <div id="session-panel">\n <p style="color:#94a3b8; margin-bottom:20px; font-size:0.88rem;">\n Configure this recording session. To start a new session, restart the tool.\n </p>\n <div class="form-group">\n <label for="sess-policy-id">Policy ID *</label>\n <input type="text" id="sess-policy-id" placeholder="e.g. pi0_v2">\n </div>\n <div class="form-group">\n <label for="sess-annotator">Annotator Name *</label>\n <input type="text" id="sess-annotator" placeholder="e.g. Alice">\n </div>\n <div class="form-group">\n <label>Cameras *</label>\n <div id="cameras-list"></div>\n <button type="button" class="btn-add-cam" onclick="addCamera()">+ Add Camera</button>\n </div>\n <div class="btn-row" style="margin-top:20px">\n <button class="btn-start" id="btn-session-start">Start Session &rarr;</button>\n </div>\n </div>\n\n <!-- Task panels (hidden until session configured) -->\n <div id="task-panels" style="display:none">\n <div id="session-info" style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#94a3b8;margin-bottom:16px;"></div>\n <div id="status-badge" class="status-badge s-idle">Idle</div>\n\n <!-- Idle: instruction form -->\n <div id="form-panel">\n <label for="instruction">Task Instruction</label>\n <textarea id="instruction" placeholder="e.g. Pick up the cup and place it on the tray"></textarea>\n <div class="btn-row">\n <button class="btn-start" id="btn-start">Start Rollout</button>\n </div>\n <div class="hint">Ctrl+Enter to start</div>\n </div>\n\n <!-- Running / pending: spinner -->\n <div id="spinner-panel" class="spinner-wrap" style="display:none">\n <div class="spinner"></div>\n <div class="label">Rollout in progress&hellip;</div>\n <div class="task-text" id="running-task"></div>\n </div>\n\n <!-- Annotating: redirect in progress -->\n <div id="annotating-panel" class="spinner-wrap" style="display:none">\n <div class="spinner"></div>\n <div class="label">Redirecting to annotation&hellip;</div>\n </div>\n </div>\n </div>\n\n <script>\n let lastInstruction = \'\';\n\n function addCamera(name) {\n const list = document.getElementById(\'cameras-list\');\n const div = document.createElement(\'div\');\n div.className = \'camera-row\';\n div.innerHTML = `<input type="text" class="camera-input" value="${name || \'\'}" placeholder="e.g. left"><button type="button" onclick="this.parentElement.remove()">&times;</button>`;\n list.appendChild(div);\n }\n\n document.getElementById(\'btn-session-start\').addEventListener(\'click\', async () => {\n const policyId = document.getElementById(\'sess-policy-id\').value.trim();\n const annotator = document.getElementById(\'sess-annotator\').value.trim();\n const inputs = document.querySelectorAll(\'.camera-input\');\n const cameraNames = Array.from(inputs).map(i => i.value.trim()).filter(Boolean);\n if (!policyId || !annotator || !cameraNames.length) {\n alert(\'Please fill in Policy ID, Annotator Name, and at least one Camera.\');\n return;\n }\n const resp = await fetch(\'/api/session\', {\n method: \'POST\',\n headers: { \'Content-Type\': \'application/json\' },\n body: JSON.stringify({ policy_id: policyId, annotator_name: annotator, camera_names: cameraNames }),\n });\n if (resp.ok) {\n localStorage.setItem(\'annotator_name\', annotator);\n pollAll();\n } else {\n const err = await resp.json();\n alert(err.error || \'Failed to create session\');\n }\n });\n\n async function pollAll() {\n try {\n const session = await fetch(\'/api/session\').then(r => r.json());\n if (!session.configured) {\n document.getElementById(\'session-panel\').style.display = \'\';\n document.getElementById(\'task-panels\').style.display = \'none\';\n // Pre-fill from prefilled_data\n const pd = session.prefilled_data || {};\n if (pd.policy_id && !document.getElementById(\'sess-policy-id\').value)\n document.getElementById(\'sess-policy-id\').value = pd.policy_id;\n if (pd.camera_names && pd.camera_names.length && !document.querySelector(\'.camera-input\'))\n pd.camera_names.forEach(n => addCamera(n));\n else if (!document.querySelector(\'.camera-input\'))\n [\'left\', \'right\', \'wrist\'].forEach(n => addCamera(n));\n return;\n }\n // Session configured\n document.getElementById(\'session-panel\').style.display = \'none\';\n document.getElementById(\'task-panels\').style.display = \'\';\n document.getElementById(\'session-info\').textContent =\n `Session: ${session.annotator_name} \\u00b7 ${session.policy_id} \\u00b7 ${session.camera_names.join(\', \')}`;\n\n const state = await fetch(\'/api/task/state\').then(r => r.json());\n applyState(state);\n } catch (_) {}\n }\n\n function applyState(state) {\n const status = state.status;\n lastInstruction = state.last_instruction || \'\';\n\n const badge = document.getElementById(\'status-badge\');\n const labels = { idle: \'Idle\', pending: \'Pending\', running: \'Running\', annotating: \'Annotating\' };\n badge.textContent = labels[status] || status;\n badge.className = \'status-badge s-\' + status;\n\n document.getElementById(\'form-panel\').style.display = status === \'idle\' ? \'\' : \'none\';\n document.getElementById(\'spinner-panel\').style.display = (status === \'pending\' || status === \'running\') ? \'\' : \'none\';\n document.getElementById(\'annotating-panel\').style.display = status === \'annotating\' ? \'\' : \'none\';\n\n if (status === \'idle\') {\n const textarea = document.getElementById(\'instruction\');\n if (lastInstruction && !textarea.value.trim()) {\n textarea.value = lastInstruction;\n textarea.select();\n }\n }\n\n if (status === \'pending\' || status === \'running\') {\n document.getElementById(\'running-task\').textContent =\n state.last_instruction || state.pending_instruction || \'\';\n }\n\n if (status === \'annotating\' && state.current_sample_idx !== null) {\n window.location.href = \'/?sample=\' + state.current_sample_idx;\n }\n }\n\n document.getElementById(\'btn-start\').addEventListener(\'click\', async () => {\n const val = document.getElementById(\'instruction\').value.trim();\n if (!val) { document.getElementById(\'instruction\').focus(); return; }\n await fetch(\'/api/task/submit\', {\n method: \'POST\',\n headers: { \'Content-Type\': \'application/json\' },\n body: JSON.stringify({ instruction: val }),\n });\n document.getElementById(\'instruction\').value = \'\';\n });\n\n document.getElementById(\'instruction\').addEventListener(\'keydown\', e => {\n if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === \'Enter\') document.getElementById(\'btn-start\').click();\n });\n\n setInterval(pollAll, 500);\n pollAll();\n </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n\n'
OVERVIEW_HTML = '<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang="en">\n<head>\n <meta charset="UTF-8">\n <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">\n <title>Annotation Overview</title>\n <style>\n * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }\n body {\n font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \'Segoe UI\', Roboto, sans-serif;\n background: #1a1a2e;\n color: #eee;\n min-height: 100vh;\n }\n .container {\n max-width: 1600px;\n margin: 0 auto;\n padding: 20px;\n }\n header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n padding-bottom: 15px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid #333;\n }\n h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; }\n .header-links a {\n color: #60a5fa;\n text-decoration: none;\n margin-left: 20px;\n }\n .header-links a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }\n .stats-bar {\n display: flex;\n gap: 20px;\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n }\n .stat-card {\n background: #16213e;\n border-radius: 8px;\n padding: 15px 20px;\n min-width: 140px;\n }\n .stat-value {\n font-size: 1.8rem;\n font-weight: 700;\n color: #4ade80;\n }\n .stat-value.warn { color: #fbbf24; }\n .stat-value.danger { color: #f87171; }\n .stat-label {\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n color: #94a3b8;\n margin-top: 4px;\n }\n .filters {\n display: flex;\n gap: 10px;\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n align-items: center;\n }\n .tooltip {\n position: relative;\n cursor: help;\n }\n .tooltip::after {\n content: attr(data-tooltip);\n position: absolute;\n left: 50%;\n transform: translateX(-50%);\n bottom: calc(100% + 8px);\n width: 280px;\n max-width: 320px;\n background: #0f172a;\n color: #e2e8f0;\n border: 1px solid #334155;\n padding: 8px 10px;\n border-radius: 6px;\n font-size: 0.75rem;\n line-height: 1.3;\n white-space: pre-line;\n opacity: 0;\n pointer-events: none;\n transition: opacity 0.08s ease-out;\n z-index: 50;\n box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);\n }\n .tooltip::before {\n content: \'\';\n position: absolute;\n left: 50%;\n transform: translateX(-50%);\n bottom: calc(100% + 2px);\n border-width: 6px;\n border-style: solid;\n border-color: #0f172a transparent transparent transparent;\n opacity: 0;\n transition: opacity 0.08s ease-out;\n z-index: 51;\n }\n .tooltip:hover::after,\n .tooltip:hover::before {\n opacity: 1;\n }\n .filter-btn {\n padding: 8px 16px;\n border: 1px solid #333;\n border-radius: 4px;\n background: #16213e;\n color: #eee;\n cursor: pointer;\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n transition: all 0.15s;\n }\n .filter-btn:hover { border-color: #60a5fa; }\n .filter-btn.active {\n background: #1e3a5f;\n border-color: #60a5fa;\n color: #60a5fa;\n }\n .search-input {\n padding: 8px 12px;\n border: 1px solid #333;\n border-radius: 4px;\n background: #16213e;\n color: #eee;\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n width: 200px;\n }\n table {\n width: 100%;\n border-collapse: collapse;\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n }\n thead th {\n background: #16213e;\n padding: 12px 10px;\n text-align: left;\n position: sticky;\n top: 0;\n z-index: 10;\n border-bottom: 2px solid #333;\n white-space: nowrap;\n }\n tbody tr {\n border-bottom: 1px solid #222;\n cursor: pointer;\n transition: background 0.1s;\n }\n tbody tr:hover { background: #16213e; }\n tbody td {\n padding: 10px;\n vertical-align: top;\n }\n .sample-id-cell {\n font-family: monospace;\n white-space: nowrap;\n color: #60a5fa;\n }\n .task-cell {\n max-width: 200px;\n overflow: hidden;\n text-overflow: ellipsis;\n white-space: nowrap;\n }\n .soft-cell {\n min-width: 120px;\n color: #cbd5f5;\n font-size: 0.78rem;\n }\n .soft-line {\n display: block;\n margin-bottom: 4px;\n }\n .ann-cell {\n min-width: 220px;\n max-width: 320px;\n }\n .ann-cell.empty {\n color: #555;\n font-style: italic;\n }\n .ann-category {\n display: flex;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n gap: 4px;\n margin-bottom: 4px;\n }\n .category-tag {\n display: inline-block;\n padding: 2px 8px;\n border-radius: 10px;\n font-size: 0.75rem;\n background: #1e3a5f;\n color: #60a5fa;\n }\n .ann-description {\n color: #ccc;\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n line-height: 1.4;\n margin-bottom: 4px;\n }\n .ann-retry {\n font-size: 0.75rem;\n color: #94a3b8;\n }\n .ann-meta {\n font-size: 0.72rem;\n color: #8fa2b8;\n margin-top: 4px;\n }\n .vlm-tag {\n display: inline-block;\n margin-top: 4px;\n padding: 2px 6px;\n border-radius: 999px;\n font-size: 0.7rem;\n border: 1px solid #1e3a5f;\n color: #60a5fa;\n background: #0f172a;\n }\n .disagree {\n background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.08);\n }\n .disagree-marker {\n display: inline-block;\n width: 8px;\n height: 8px;\n border-radius: 50%;\n background: #fbbf24;\n margin-right: 6px;\n }\n .agree-marker {\n display: inline-block;\n width: 8px;\n height: 8px;\n border-radius: 50%;\n background: #4ade80;\n margin-right: 6px;\n }\n .loading {\n text-align: center;\n padding: 50px;\n color: #888;\n }\n robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator-header {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 6px;\n }\n .vlm-badge {\n display: inline-block;\n padding: 2px 6px;\n border-radius: 999px;\n font-size: 0.7rem;\n border: 1px solid #1e3a5f;\n color: #60a5fa;\n background: #0f172a;\n }\n robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator-color {\n width: 10px;\n height: 10px;\n border-radius: 50%;\n display: inline-block;\n }\n </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n <div class="container">\n <header>\n <h1>Annotation Overview</h1>\n <div class="header-links">\n <a href="/">Back to Annotator</a>\n </div>\n </header>\n <div class="stats-bar" id="stats-bar">\n <div class="loading">Loading...</div>\n </div>\n <div class="filters">\n <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All</button>\n <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="disagree">Disagreements</button>\n <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="agree">Agreements</button>\n <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="soft">Soft Agree</button>\n <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="none">No annotations</button>\n <input type="text" class="search-input" id="search" placeholder="Search sample ID or task...">\n </div>\n <table>\n <thead id="table-head"></thead>\n <tbody id="table-body">\n <tr><td class="loading" colspan="10">Loading...</td></tr>\n </tbody>\n </table>\n </div>\n <script>\n const ANNOTATOR_COLORS = [\'#60a5fa\', \'#f472b6\', \'#fbbf24\', \'#4ade80\', \'#a78bfa\', \'#fb923c\'];\n let overviewData = null;\n let currentFilter = \'all\';\n let searchQuery = \'\';\n const SOFT_AGREE_HUMAN_TOOLTIP = \'Soft agreement (Human) = Jaccard similarity of failure categories only: |A ∩ B| / |A ∪ B|.\\\\nPer-sample: average across all human-human pairs for that sample.\\\\nStat: mean of per-sample averages (samples with >=2 human annotations).\';\n const SOFT_AGREE_VLM_TOOLTIP = \'Soft agreement (VLM-Human) = Jaccard similarity of failure categories only.\\\\nPer-sample: average across all human-VLM pairs for that sample.\\\\nStat: mean of per-sample averages (samples with >=1 human and >=1 VLM).\';\n const SOFT_AGREE_COLUMN_TOOLTIP = \'Soft Agree column shows per-sample averages.\\\\nHuman: average across all human-human pairs.\\\\nVLM: average across all human-VLM pairs.\';\n const STRICT_AGREE_HUMAN_TOOLTIP = \'Strict agree (Human) = all human annotators have identical failure categories and would_retry.\';\n const STRICT_AGREE_VLM_TOOLTIP = \'Strict agree (VLM-Human) = any VLM annotation exactly matches any human annotation on failure categories and would_retry.\';\n const SOFT_AGREE_THRESHOLD = 0.5;\n const SOFT_AGREE_FILTER_TOOLTIP = `Soft Agree filter: shows samples with Human or VLM soft agreement >= ${Math.round(SOFT_AGREE_THRESHOLD * 100)}%.`;\n\n function formatPct(value) {\n if (value === null || value === undefined) return \'--\';\n return `${Math.round(value * 100)}%`;\n }\n\n async function init() {\n overviewData = await fetch(\'/api/overview\').then(r => r.json());\n const softBtn = document.querySelector(\'button[data-filter="soft"]\');\n if (softBtn) {\n softBtn.dataset.tooltip = SOFT_AGREE_FILTER_TOOLTIP;\n softBtn.classList.add(\'tooltip\');\n }\n renderStats();\n renderTableHead();\n renderTableBody();\n }\n\n function renderStats() {\n const s = overviewData.stats;\n document.getElementById(\'stats-bar\').innerHTML = `\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value">${s.total_samples}</div>\n <div class="stat-label">Total Samples</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value">${overviewData.annotators.length}</div>\n <div class="stat-label">Annotators</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value">${s.multi_annotated}</div>\n <div class="stat-label">Multi-Annotated (Human)</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value tooltip" data-tooltip="${STRICT_AGREE_HUMAN_TOOLTIP}">${s.agreement}</div>\n <div class="stat-label tooltip" data-tooltip="${STRICT_AGREE_HUMAN_TOOLTIP}">Strict Agree (Human)</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value ${s.disagreement > 0 ? \'warn\' : \'\'}">${s.disagreement}</div>\n <div class="stat-label">Disagreements (Human)</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value">${s.vlm_human_samples}</div>\n <div class="stat-label">VLM+Human Samples</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value tooltip" data-tooltip="${STRICT_AGREE_VLM_TOOLTIP}">${s.vlm_human_agreement}</div>\n <div class="stat-label tooltip" data-tooltip="${STRICT_AGREE_VLM_TOOLTIP}">Strict Agree (VLM-Human)</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value ${s.vlm_human_disagreement > 0 ? \'warn\' : \'\'}">${s.vlm_human_disagreement}</div>\n <div class="stat-label">VLM-Human Disagreements</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value tooltip" data-tooltip="${SOFT_AGREE_HUMAN_TOOLTIP}">${formatPct(s.human_soft_agreement_avg)}</div>\n <div class="stat-label tooltip" data-tooltip="${SOFT_AGREE_HUMAN_TOOLTIP}">Soft Agree (Human)</div>\n </div>\n <div class="stat-card">\n <div class="stat-value tooltip" data-tooltip="${SOFT_AGREE_VLM_TOOLTIP}">${formatPct(s.vlm_human_soft_agreement_avg)}</div>\n <div class="stat-label tooltip" data-tooltip="${SOFT_AGREE_VLM_TOOLTIP}">Soft Agree (VLM)</div>\n </div>\n `;\n }\n\n function renderTableHead() {\n const annotators = overviewData.annotators;\n const vlmAnnotators = new Set(overviewData.vlm_annotators || []);\n let headers = `<tr><th>Sample</th><th>Task</th><th class="tooltip" data-tooltip="${SOFT_AGREE_COLUMN_TOOLTIP}">Soft Agree</th>`;\n annotators.forEach((name, i) => {\n const color = ANNOTATOR_COLORS[i % ANNOTATOR_COLORS.length];\n const isVlm = vlmAnnotators.has(name);\n headers += `<th><div class="annotator-header">\n <span class="annotator-color" style="background:${color}"></span>\n ${name}\n ${isVlm ? \'<span class="vlm-badge">VLM</span>\' : \'\'}\n </div></th>`;\n });\n headers += \'</tr>\';\n document.getElementById(\'table-head\').innerHTML = headers;\n }\n\n function filterSamples() {\n return overviewData.samples.filter(s => {\n // Text search\n if (searchQuery) {\n const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n const matchId = s.id.toLowerCase().includes(q);\n const matchTask = (s.metadata.language_instruction || \'\').toLowerCase().includes(q);\n if (!matchId && !matchTask) return false;\n }\n\n switch (currentFilter) {\n case \'disagree\':\n return s.has_disagreement;\n case \'agree\':\n return s.human_annotator_count >= 2 && !s.has_disagreement;\n case \'soft\': {\n const humanSoft = (s.human_soft_agreement ?? -1);\n const vlmSoft = (s.vlm_human_soft_agreement ?? -1);\n return humanSoft >= SOFT_AGREE_THRESHOLD || vlmSoft >= SOFT_AGREE_THRESHOLD;\n }\n case \'none\':\n return s.annotator_count === 0;\n default:\n return true;\n }\n });\n }\n\n function renderAnnotationCell(ann) {\n if (!ann) return \'<td class="ann-cell empty">--</td>\';\n\n const cats = Array.isArray(ann.failure_category)\n ? ann.failure_category\n : (ann.failure_category ? [ann.failure_category] : []);\n\n const catTags = cats.map(c => `<span class="category-tag">${c}</span>`).join(\'\');\n const desc = ann.failure_description || \'\';\n const retry = ann.would_retry || \'\';\n const isVlm = ann.source === \'vlm\';\n const model = ann.model ? `<div class="ann-meta">Model: ${ann.model}</div>` : \'\';\n const conf = (ann.aggregated_confidence !== undefined && ann.aggregated_confidence !== null)\n ? `<div class="ann-meta">Confidence: ${Math.round(ann.aggregated_confidence * 100)}%</div>`\n : \'\';\n const vlmTag = isVlm ? \'<div class="vlm-tag">VLM</div>\' : \'\';\n\n return `<td class="ann-cell">\n <div class="ann-category">${catTags}</div>\n <div class="ann-description">${desc}</div>\n ${retry ? `<div class="ann-retry">Retry: ${retry}</div>` : \'\'}\n ${model}\n ${conf}\n ${vlmTag}\n </td>`;\n }\n\n function renderTableBody() {\n const filtered = filterSamples();\n const annotators = overviewData.annotators;\n\n if (filtered.length === 0) {\n document.getElementById(\'table-body\').innerHTML =\n `<tr><td colspan="${3 + annotators.length}" class="loading">No samples match this filter.</td></tr>`;\n return;\n }\n\n let rows = \'\';\n for (const sample of filtered) {\n const rowClass = sample.has_disagreement ? \'disagree\' : \'\';\n const marker = sample.human_annotator_count >= 2\n ? (sample.has_disagreement\n ? \'<span class="disagree-marker"></span>\'\n : \'<span class="agree-marker"></span>\')\n : \'\';\n\n rows += `<tr class="${rowClass}" data-id="${sample.id}">`;\n rows += `<td class="sample-id-cell">${marker}${sample.id}</td>`;\n rows += `<td class="task-cell" title="${sample.metadata.language_instruction || \'\'}">${sample.metadata.language_instruction || \'N/A\'}</td>`;\n const humanSoft = formatPct(sample.human_soft_agreement);\n const vlmSoft = formatPct(sample.vlm_human_soft_agreement);\n rows += `<td class="soft-cell tooltip" data-tooltip="${SOFT_AGREE_COLUMN_TOOLTIP}">\n <span class="soft-line">Human: ${humanSoft}</span>\n <span class="soft-line">VLM: ${vlmSoft}</span>\n </td>`;\n\n for (const name of annotators) {\n rows += renderAnnotationCell(sample.annotations[name]);\n }\n rows += \'</tr>\';\n }\n\n document.getElementById(\'table-body\').innerHTML = rows;\n\n // Click to open in annotator\n document.querySelectorAll(\'tbody tr[data-id]\').forEach(row => {\n row.addEventListener(\'click\', () => {\n const idx = overviewData.samples.findIndex(s => s.id === row.dataset.id);\n if (idx >= 0) window.open(`/?sample=${idx}`, \'_blank\');\n });\n });\n }\n\n // Filter buttons\n document.querySelectorAll(\'.filter-btn\').forEach(btn => {\n btn.addEventListener(\'click\', () => {\n document.querySelectorAll(\'.filter-btn\').forEach(b => b.classList.remove(\'active\'));\n btn.classList.add(\'active\');\n currentFilter = btn.dataset.filter;\n renderTableBody();\n });\n });\n\n // Search\n document.getElementById(\'search\').addEventListener(\'input\', (e) => {\n searchQuery = e.target.value;\n renderTableBody();\n });\n\n init();\n </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n\n'
HTML_TEMPLATE = '<html lang="en">\n<head>\n <meta charset="UTF-8">\n <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">\n <title>Robotic Failure Annotation</title>\n <style>\n * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }\n body {\n font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \'Segoe UI\', Roboto, sans-serif;\n background: #1a1a2e;\n color: #eee;\n min-height: 100vh;\n }\n .container {\n max-width: 1400px;\n margin: 0 auto;\n padding: 20px;\n }\n header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n padding-bottom: 15px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid #333;\n }\n h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; }\n .progress {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 10px;\n }\n .progress-bar {\n width: 200px;\n height: 8px;\n background: #333;\n border-radius: 4px;\n overflow: hidden;\n }\n .progress-fill {\n height: 100%;\n background: #4ade80;\n transition: width 0.3s;\n }\n main-content {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr 400px;\n gap: 20px;\n }\n .sample-list {\n background: #16213e;\n border-radius: 8px;\n padding: 10px;\n max-height: calc(100vh - 120px);\n overflow-y: auto;\n }\n .sample-list h3 {\n font-size: 0.9rem;\n color: #94a3b8;\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n padding: 0 5px;\n }\n .sample-item {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 8px;\n padding: 8px 10px;\n border-radius: 4px;\n cursor: pointer;\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n font-family: monospace;\n transition: background 0.15s;\n }\n .sample-item:hover {\n background: #1a1a2e;\n }\n .sample-item.active {\n background: #1e3a5f;\n color: #60a5fa;\n }\n .sample-item .check {\n color: #4ade80;\n font-weight: bold;\n }\n .sample-item .pending {\n color: #666;\n }\n .sample-group {\n margin-bottom: 8px;\n }\n .sample-group-title {\n font-size: 0.78rem;\n color: #94a3b8;\n padding: 6px 8px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid #223257;\n margin-bottom: 4px;\n word-break: break-word;\n }\n .sample-group-count {\n color: #64748b;\n font-size: 0.72rem;\n }\n .video-section {\n background: #16213e;\n border-radius: 8px;\n padding: 20px;\n }\n video {\n width: 100%;\n border-radius: 4px;\n background: #000;\n }\n .video-view {\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n }\n .video-label {\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n font-weight: 600;\n color: #94a3b8;\n margin-bottom: 4px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n }\n .metadata {\n margin-bottom: 15px;\n padding: 15px;\n background: #1a1a2e;\n border-radius: 4px;\n font-size: 0.9rem;\n }\n .metadata-row {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n margin-bottom: 8px;\n }\n .metadata-label {\n color: #888;\n width: 120px;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n }\n .metadata-value {\n color: #fff;\n }\n .metadata-batch-toggle {\n display: inline-flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 4px;\n margin-left: 8px;\n font-size: 0.75rem;\n color: #94a3b8;\n white-space: nowrap;\n }\n .metadata-batch-actions {\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n align-items: flex-start;\n gap: 6px;\n margin-top: 10px;\n }\n .metadata-batch-target {\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n color: #94a3b8;\n }\n .form-section {\n background: #16213e;\n border-radius: 8px;\n padding: 20px;\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n }\n .form-group {\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n }\n label {\n display: block;\n margin-bottom: 8px;\n font-weight: 500;\n }\n .required::after {\n content: " *";\n color: #f87171;\n }\n input[type="text"], textarea, select {\n width: 100%;\n padding: 10px;\n border: 1px solid #333;\n border-radius: 4px;\n background: #1a1a2e;\n color: #fff;\n font-size: 0.95rem;\n }\n textarea { min-height: 100px; resize: vertical; }\n select { cursor: pointer; }\n .radio-group, .checkbox-group {\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n gap: 8px;\n }\n .radio-option, .checkbox-option {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 8px;\n cursor: pointer;\n }\n .info-icon {\n display: inline-flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n width: 15px;\n height: 15px;\n border-radius: 50%;\n background: #1e3a5f;\n color: #60a5fa;\n font-size: 0.65rem;\n font-style: normal;\n cursor: help;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n position: relative;\n }\n .info-icon .info-tooltip {\n display: none;\n position: absolute;\n right: 20px;\n top: 50%;\n transform: translateY(-50%);\n background: #1e293b;\n color: #cbd5e1;\n border: 1px solid #334155;\n border-radius: 6px;\n padding: 8px 12px;\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n line-height: 1.4;\n width: 280px;\n z-index: 100;\n pointer-events: none;\n white-space: normal;\n }\n .info-icon:hover .info-tooltip {\n display: block;\n }\n input[type="radio"], input[type="checkbox"] {\n width: 18px;\n height: 18px;\n cursor: pointer;\n }\n .nav-buttons {\n display: flex;\n gap: 10px;\n margin-top: auto;\n padding-top: 20px;\n }\n button {\n flex: 1;\n padding: 12px 20px;\n border: none;\n border-radius: 4px;\n font-size: 1rem;\n cursor: pointer;\n transition: background 0.2s;\n }\n .btn-prev, .btn-next {\n background: #333;\n color: #fff;\n }\n .btn-prev:hover, .btn-next:hover { background: #444; }\n .btn-save {\n background: #4ade80;\n color: #000;\n font-weight: 600;\n }\n .btn-save:hover { background: #22c55e; }\n .btn-save:disabled {\n background: #555;\n color: #888;\n cursor: not-allowed;\n }\n .sample-nav {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 15px;\n margin-bottom: 15px;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n }\n .sample-id {\n font-family: monospace;\n font-size: 1.1rem;\n color: #4ade80;\n }\n .annotation-status {\n padding: 4px 10px;\n border-radius: 4px;\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n }\n .status-annotated {\n background: #166534;\n color: #4ade80;\n }\n .status-pending {\n background: #854d0e;\n color: #fbbf24;\n }\n .status-vlm {\n background: #1e3a5f;\n color: #60a5fa;\n }\n robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator-list {\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n color: #888;\n }\n robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator-name-group {\n background: #0f172a;\n padding: 15px;\n border-radius: 8px;\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n border: 2px solid #4ade80;\n }\n robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator-name-group input {\n font-size: 1.1rem;\n font-weight: 500;\n }\n robotic_failure_data.annotation_tool.annotator-name-group .hint {\n color: #666;\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n margin-top: 5px;\n display: block;\n }\n .vlm-panel {\n background: #1e293b;\n border: 1px solid #334155;\n border-radius: 8px;\n padding: 15px;\n margin-top: 15px;\n }\n .vlm-panel h3 {\n font-size: 1rem;\n color: #60a5fa;\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 8px;\n }\n .vlm-field {\n margin-bottom: 12px;\n }\n .vlm-field-label {\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n color: #94a3b8;\n margin-bottom: 4px;\n }\n .vlm-field-value {\n font-size: 0.9rem;\n color: #e2e8f0;\n background: #0f172a;\n padding: 8px;\n border-radius: 4px;\n }\n .vlm-confidence {\n display: inline-block;\n padding: 2px 8px;\n border-radius: 10px;\n font-size: 0.75rem;\n background: #1e3a5f;\n color: #60a5fa;\n }\n .vlm-view-details {\n margin-top: 10px;\n padding-top: 10px;\n border-top: 1px solid #334155;\n }\n .vlm-view-item {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n padding: 4px 0;\n font-size: 0.85rem;\n }\n .vlm-view-name {\n color: #94a3b8;\n }\n .btn-accept-vlm {\n background: #1e40af;\n color: #fff;\n width: 100%;\n margin-top: 10px;\n }\n .btn-accept-vlm:hover {\n background: #1d4ed8;\n }\n .keyboard-hint {\n color: #666;\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n text-align: center;\n margin-top: 10px;\n }\n .loading {\n text-align: center;\n padding: 50px;\n color: #888;\n }\n .btn-edit-questionnaire {\n background: #333;\n color: #fff;\n border: none;\n padding: 8px 16px;\n border-radius: 4px;\n cursor: pointer;\n font-size: 0.9rem;\n }\n .btn-edit-questionnaire:hover { background: #444; }\n .btn-header-link {\n display: inline-block;\n background: #1e293b;\n color: #e2e8f0;\n border: 1px solid #334155;\n padding: 8px 16px;\n border-radius: 4px;\n text-decoration: none;\n font-size: 0.9rem;\n }\n .btn-header-link:hover { background: #334155; }\n .modal {\n display: none;\n position: fixed;\n top: 0;\n left: 0;\n width: 100%;\n height: 100%;\n background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);\n z-index: 1000;\n justify-content: center;\n align-items: center;\n }\n .modal.active { display: flex; }\n .modal-content {\n background: #16213e;\n border-radius: 8px;\n padding: 20px;\n width: 90%;\n max-width: 800px;\n max-height: 90vh;\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n }\n .modal-header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n margin-bottom: 15px;\n }\n .modal-header h2 { font-size: 1.2rem; }\n .modal-close {\n background: none;\n border: none;\n color: #888;\n font-size: 1.5rem;\n cursor: pointer;\n padding: 0;\n line-height: 1;\n }\n .modal-close:hover { color: #fff; }\n .editor-container {\n flex: 1;\n min-height: 400px;\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n }\n .editor-textarea {\n flex: 1;\n font-family: \'Monaco\', \'Menlo\', \'Ubuntu Mono\', monospace;\n font-size: 0.9rem;\n line-height: 1.5;\n padding: 15px;\n border: 1px solid #333;\n border-radius: 4px;\n background: #1a1a2e;\n color: #fff;\n resize: none;\n tab-size: 2;\n }\n .editor-error {\n color: #f87171;\n padding: 10px;\n background: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.1);\n border-radius: 4px;\n margin-top: 10px;\n display: none;\n }\n .editor-error.visible { display: block; }\n .modal-actions {\n display: flex;\n gap: 10px;\n margin-top: 15px;\n justify-content: flex-end;\n }\n .btn-cancel {\n background: #333;\n color: #fff;\n }\n .btn-cancel:hover { background: #444; }\n .editor-hint {\n color: #666;\n font-size: 0.8rem;\n margin-top: 10px;\n }\n .meta-field-wrap {\n position: relative;\n flex: 1;\n }\n .meta-missing-hint {\n display: none;\n position: absolute;\n top: -18px;\n left: 0;\n background: #ef4444;\n color: #fff;\n font-size: 0.65rem;\n font-weight: 600;\n padding: 2px 6px;\n border-radius: 3px;\n white-space: nowrap;\n pointer-events: none;\n z-index: 10;\n }\n .meta-field-wrap.meta-error .meta-missing-hint { display: block; }\n .meta-field-wrap.meta-error .metadata-value {\n border-color: #ef4444;\n box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25);\n }\n .metadata-row { overflow: visible; }\n </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n <div class="container">\n <header>\n <h1 id="title">Loading...</h1>\n <div class="progress">\n <a class="btn-header-link" href="/overview">View Existing Annotations</a>\n <button class="btn-edit-questionnaire" id="btn-edit-questionnaire">Edit Questionnaire</button>\n <span id="progress-text">0/0</span>\n <div class="progress-bar">\n <div class="progress-fill" id="progress-fill" style="width: 0%"></div>\n </div>\n </div>\n </header>\n\n <!-- Questionnaire Editor Modal -->\n <div class="modal" id="questionnaire-modal">\n <div class="modal-content">\n <div class="modal-header">\n <h2>Edit Questionnaire (YAML)</h2>\n <button class="modal-close" id="modal-close">&times;</button>\n </div>\n <div class="editor-container">\n <textarea class="editor-textarea" id="questionnaire-editor" spellcheck="false"></textarea>\n <div class="editor-error" id="editor-error"></div>\n </div>\n <div class="editor-hint">\n Supported types: select, radio, checkbox, text, textarea. Changes apply immediately after saving.\n </div>\n <div class="modal-actions">\n <button class="btn-cancel" id="btn-editor-cancel">Cancel</button>\n <button class="btn-save" id="btn-editor-save">Save &amp; Reload</button>\n </div>\n </div>\n </div>\n <div class="main-content">\n <!-- Sample Navigation List -->\n <div class="sample-list" id="sample-list">\n <h3>Samples</h3>\n <div id="sample-list-items"></div>\n </div>\n <div class="video-section">\n <div class="sample-nav">\n <span class="sample-id" id="sample-id">---</span>\n <span class="annotation-status" id="annotation-status">---</span>\n <span class="annotator-list" id="annotator-list"></span>\n </div>\n <div id="video-container">\n <!-- populated dynamically by loadSample -->\n </div>\n <div class="vlm-panel" id="vlm-panel" style="display: none;">\n <h3>\n <span>VLM Annotation</span>\n <span class="vlm-confidence" id="vlm-confidence">--</span>\n </h3>\n <div class="vlm-field">\n <div class="vlm-field-label">Annotator</div>\n <div class="vlm-field-value" id="vlm-annotator">--</div>\n </div>\n <div class="vlm-field">\n <div class="vlm-field-label">Failure Category</div>\n <div class="vlm-field-value" id="vlm-category">--</div>\n </div>\n <div class="vlm-field">\n <div class="vlm-field-label">Description</div>\n <div class="vlm-field-value" id="vlm-description">--</div>\n </div>\n <div class="vlm-field">\n <div class="vlm-field-label">Would Retry?</div>\n <div class="vlm-field-value" id="vlm-retry">--</div>\n </div>\n <div class="vlm-view-details" id="vlm-views">\n <div class="vlm-field-label">Per-View Predictions</div>\n <div id="vlm-views-list"></div>\n </div>\n <button type="button" class="btn-accept-vlm" id="btn-accept-vlm">\n Accept VLM Annotation\n </button>\n </div>\n </div>\n <div class="form-section">\n <!-- Task Metadata -->\n <div class="metadata" id="metadata">\n <div class="metadata-row">\n <span class="metadata-label">Episode ID:</span>\n <input type="text" class="metadata-value" id="meta-episode-id">\n </div>\n <div class="metadata-row">\n <span class="metadata-label">Task:</span>\n <input type="text" class="metadata-value" id="meta-language-instruction">\n </div>\n <div class="metadata-row">\n <span class="metadata-label">Policy:</span>\n <span class="metadata-value" id="meta-policy-name">N/A</span>\n </div>\n <div class="metadata-row">\n <span class="metadata-label">Policy ID:</span>\n <span class="meta-field-wrap" id="wrap-meta-policy-id">\n <input type="text" class="metadata-value" id="meta-policy-id"\n list="datalist-policy-id"\n placeholder="Select or type your own...">\n <span class="meta-missing-hint">missing</span>\n </span>\n <label class="metadata-batch-toggle">\n <input type="checkbox" class="meta-batch-field" data-meta-key="policy_id">\n Apply to all\n </label>\n </div>\n <div class="metadata-row">\n <span class="metadata-label">Lab ID:</span>\n <span class="meta-field-wrap" id="wrap-meta-lab-id">\n <input type="text" class="metadata-value" id="meta-lab-id">\n <span class="meta-missing-hint">missing</span>\n </span>\n <label class="metadata-batch-toggle">\n <input type="checkbox" class="meta-batch-field" data-meta-key="lab_id">\n Apply to all\n </label>\n </div>\n <div class="metadata-row">\n <span class="metadata-label">Operator:</span>\n <span class="meta-field-wrap" id="wrap-meta-operator-name">\n <input type="text" class="metadata-value" id="meta-operator-name">\n <span class="meta-missing-hint">missing</span>\n </span>\n <label class="metadata-batch-toggle">\n <input type="checkbox" class="meta-batch-field" data-meta-key="operator_name">\n Apply to all\n </label>\n </div>\n <div class="metadata-row">\n <span class="metadata-label">Robot ID:</span>\n <span class="meta-field-wrap" id="wrap-meta-robot-id">\n <input type="text" class="metadata-value" id="meta-robot-id"\n list="datalist-robot-id"\n placeholder="Select or type your own...">\n <span class="meta-missing-hint">missing</span>\n </span>\n <label class="metadata-batch-toggle">\n <input type="checkbox" class="meta-batch-field" data-meta-key="robot_id">\n Apply to all\n </label>\n </div>\n <div class="metadata-row">\n <span class="metadata-label">Control Freq:</span>\n <span class="meta-field-wrap" id="wrap-meta-control-freq">\n <input type="text" class="metadata-value" id="meta-control-freq">\n <span class="meta-missing-hint">missing</span>\n </span>\n <label class="metadata-batch-toggle">\n <input type="checkbox" class="meta-batch-field" data-meta-key="control_freq">\n Apply to all\n </label>\n </div>\n <datalist id="datalist-robot-id"></datalist>\n <datalist id="datalist-policy-id"></datalist>\n <div class="metadata-batch-actions">\n <button type="button" class="btn-save" id="btn-apply-subdir-metadata">Apply Selected to Subdirectory</button>\n <span class="metadata-batch-target" id="meta-subdir-target">Current subdirectory: --</span>\n </div>\n </div>\n <form id="annotation-form">\n <div id="questions-container">\n <div class="loading">Loading questionnaire...</div>\n </div>\n </form>\n <div class="nav-buttons">\n <button type="button" class="btn-prev" id="btn-prev">&larr; Prev</button>\n <button type="button" class="btn-save" id="btn-save">Save</button>\n <button type="button" class="btn-next" id="btn-next">Next &rarr;</button>\n </div>\n <div class="keyboard-hint">Keyboard: &larr;/&rarr; navigate, Ctrl+Enter save</div>\n </div>\n </div>\n </div>\n\n <script>\n let samples = [];\n let currentIndex = 0;\n let questionnaire = { title: \'\', questions: [] };\n let currentVlmAnnotation = null;\n let samplesDir = \'\';\n\n async function init() {\n const [samplesRes, questRes, configRes, optionsRes] = await Promise.all([\n fetch(\'/api/samples\').then(r => r.json()),\n fetch(\'/api/questionnaire\').then(r => r.json()),\n fetch(\'/api/config\').then(r => r.json()).catch(() => ({})),\n fetch(\'/api/options\').then(r => r.json()).catch(() => ({})),\n ]);\n samples = samplesRes;\n questionnaire = questRes;\n samplesDir = configRes.samples_dir || \'\';\n\n // Populate datalist dropdowns from server-side option files\n const populateDatalist = (listId, options) => {\n const list = document.getElementById(listId);\n if (!list || !Array.isArray(options)) return;\n options.forEach(opt => {\n const el = document.createElement(\'option\');\n el.value = opt;\n list.appendChild(el);\n });\n };\n populateDatalist(\'datalist-robot-id\', optionsRes.robot_embodiments);\n populateDatalist(\'datalist-policy-id\', optionsRes.policies);\n\n document.getElementById(\'title\').textContent = questionnaire.title || \'Annotation\';\n renderQuestionnaire();\n updateProgress();\n\n // Deep-link to a specific sample via ?sample=N URL parameter\n const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n const initialSample = parseInt(urlParams.get(\'sample\') ?? \'0\', 10);\n loadSample(isNaN(initialSample) ? 0 : initialSample);\n\n // If navigated here from the task page during an active rollout,\n // poll task state and redirect back to /task once annotation is done.\n if (urlParams.has(\'sample\')) {\n const taskState = await fetch(\'/api/task/state\').then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null);\n if (taskState && taskState.status === \'annotating\') {\n const taskPoll = setInterval(async () => {\n const s = await fetch(\'/api/task/state\').then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null);\n if (s && s.status === \'idle\') {\n clearInterval(taskPoll);\n window.location.href = \'/task\';\n }\n }, 1000);\n }\n }\n\n setupVideoSync();\n }\n\n function renderQuestionnaire() {\n const container = document.getElementById(\'questions-container\');\n container.innerHTML = questionnaire.questions.map(q => {\n const reqClass = q.required ? \'required\' : \'\';\n let input = \'\';\n\n const optLabel = o => typeof o === \'string\' ? o : o.name;\n const optInfo = o => (typeof o === \'object\' && o.long_form)\n ? `<span class="info-icon">ⓘ<span class="info-tooltip">${o.long_form}</span></span>`\n : \'\';\n\n switch (q.type) {\n case \'select\':\n input = `<select name="${q.id}" ${q.required ? \'required\' : \'\'}>\n <option value="">-- Select --</option>\n ${q.options.map(o => `<option value="${optLabel(o)}">${optLabel(o)}</option>`).join(\'\')}\n </select>`;\n break;\n case \'radio\':\n input = `<div class="radio-group">\n ${q.options.map(o => `\n <label class="radio-option">\n <input type="radio" name="${q.id}" value="${optLabel(o)}" ${q.required ? \'required\' : \'\'}>\n ${optLabel(o)}${optInfo(o)}\n </label>\n `).join(\'\')}\n </div>`;\n break;\n case \'checkbox\':\n input = `<div class="checkbox-group">\n ${q.options.map(o => `\n <label class="checkbox-option">\n <input type="checkbox" name="${q.id}" value="${optLabel(o)}">\n ${optLabel(o)}${optInfo(o)}\n </label>\n `).join(\'\')}\n </div>`;\n break;\n case \'textarea\':\n input = `<textarea name="${q.id}" ${q.required ? \'required\' : \'\'}></textarea>`;\n break;\n case \'text\':\n default:\n input = `<input type="text" name="${q.id}" ${q.required ? \'required\' : \'\'}>`;\n }\n\n return `<div class="form-group" data-question-id="${q.id}">\n <label class="${reqClass}">${q.label}</label>\n ${input}\n </div>`;\n }).join(\'\');\n\n // Show/hide failure-only questions based on binary_success selection\n document.querySelectorAll(\'input[name="binary_success"]\').forEach(r =>\n r.addEventListener(\'change\', applySuccessConditional)\n );\n applySuccessConditional();\n }\n\n const FAILURE_ONLY_QUESTIONS = [\'failure_category\', \'failure_description\', \'severity\'];\n\n function applySuccessConditional() {\n const selected = document.querySelector(\'input[name="binary_success"]:checked\');\n const isSuccess = selected && selected.value === \'Success\';\n FAILURE_ONLY_QUESTIONS.forEach(id => {\n const group = document.querySelector(`[data-question-id="${id}"]`);\n if (!group) return;\n group.style.display = isSuccess ? \'none\' : \'\';\n group.querySelectorAll(\'input, textarea, select\').forEach(el => {\n if (isSuccess) {\n el.removeAttribute(\'required\');\n } else {\n const q = questionnaire.questions.find(q => q.id === id);\n if (q && q.required && el.type !== \'checkbox\') el.setAttribute(\'required\', \'\');\n }\n });\n });\n }\n\n function updateProgress() {\n // Count samples with at least one human annotation\n const annotated = samples.filter(s => s.has_human_annotation).length;\n const total = samples.length;\n document.getElementById(\'progress-text\').textContent = `${annotated}/${total}`;\n document.getElementById(\'progress-fill\').style.width = total > 0 ? `${(annotated / total) * 100}%` : \'0%\';\n renderSampleList();\n }\n\n function escapeHtml(text) {\n return String(text ?? \'\')\n .replaceAll(\'&\', \'&amp;\')\n .replaceAll(\'<\', \'&lt;\')\n .replaceAll(\'>\', \'&gt;\')\n .replaceAll(\'"\', \'&quot;\')\n .replaceAll("\'", \'&#39;\');\n }\n\n function formatSubdirectoryLabel(subdirectory) {\n return subdirectory ? subdirectory : \'(root)\';\n }\n\n function renderSampleList() {\n const container = document.getElementById(\'sample-list-items\');\n const groups = new Map();\n samples.forEach((sample, idx) => {\n const subdir = String(sample.subdirectory || \'\');\n if (!groups.has(subdir)) {\n groups.set(subdir, []);\n }\n groups.get(subdir).push({ sample, idx });\n });\n\n const html = Array.from(groups.entries()).map(([subdir, entries]) => {\n const groupLabel = formatSubdirectoryLabel(subdir);\n const itemsHtml = entries.map(({ sample, idx }) => {\n const isActive = idx === currentIndex;\n const icon = sample.has_human_annotation\n ? \'<span class="check">✓</span>\'\n : \'<span class="pending">○</span>\';\n const sampleLabel = sample.display_name || sample.id;\n return `<div class="sample-item${isActive ? \' active\' : \'\'}" data-index="${idx}">\n ${icon}\n <span>${escapeHtml(sampleLabel)}</span>\n </div>`;\n }).join(\'\');\n\n return `<div class="sample-group">\n <div class="sample-group-title">${escapeHtml(groupLabel)} <span class="sample-group-count">(${entries.length})</span></div>\n <div class="sample-group-items">${itemsHtml}</div>\n </div>`;\n }).join(\'\');\n\n container.innerHTML = html;\n\n // Add click handlers\n container.querySelectorAll(\'.sample-item\').forEach(el => {\n el.addEventListener(\'click\', () => {\n const idx = parseInt(el.dataset.index, 10);\n loadSample(idx);\n });\n });\n }\n\n async function loadSample(index) {\n if (index < 0 || index >= samples.length) return;\n currentIndex = index;\n\n // Update active state in sample list\n document.querySelectorAll(\'.sample-item\').forEach((el, idx) => {\n el.classList.toggle(\'active\', idx === index);\n });\n\n const sample = samples[index];\n document.getElementById(\'sample-id\').textContent = sample.id;\n const relSubdir = String(sample.subdirectory || \'\');\n const absSubdir = samplesDir\n ? (relSubdir ? samplesDir + \'/\' + relSubdir : samplesDir)\n : formatSubdirectoryLabel(relSubdir);\n document.getElementById(\'meta-subdir-target\').textContent =\n `Current directory: ${absSubdir}`;\n\n // Update status display\n const statusEl = document.getElementById(\'annotation-status\');\n const annotators = sample.annotators || [];\n\n if (sample.has_human_annotation) {\n statusEl.textContent = `${sample.human_annotators.length} human annotation(s)`;\n statusEl.className = \'annotation-status status-annotated\';\n } else if (sample.has_vlm_annotation) {\n statusEl.textContent = \'VLM Ready\';\n statusEl.className = \'annotation-status status-vlm\';\n } else {\n statusEl.textContent = \'Pending\';\n statusEl.className = \'annotation-status status-pending\';\n }\n\n // Show annotator list\n document.getElementById(\'annotator-list\').textContent =\n annotators.length > 0 ? `(${annotators.join(\', \')})` : \'\';\n\n // Load videos dynamically based on available camera views\n const sampleData = await fetch(`/api/samples/${sample.id}`).then(r => r.json());\n const videoContainer = document.getElementById(\'video-container\');\n const videoUrls = sampleData.video_urls || {};\n videoContainer.innerHTML = Object.entries(videoUrls).map(([cam, url]) => `\n <div class="video-view">\n <div class="video-label">${cam.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + cam.slice(1)} View</div>\n <video id="video-${cam}" controls>\n <source src="${url}" type="video/mp4">\n </video>\n </div>\n `).join(\'\');\n videoContainer.querySelectorAll(\'video\').forEach(v => v.load());\n setupVideoSync();\n\n // Load metadata\n const meta = sample.metadata;\n document.getElementById(\'meta-episode-id\').value = String(meta.episode_id || sample.id || \'\');\n document.getElementById(\'meta-language-instruction\').value = String(meta.language_instruction || \'\');\n document.getElementById(\'meta-policy-name\').textContent = String(meta.policy_name || \'N/A\');\n document.getElementById(\'meta-policy-id\').value = String(meta.policy_id || \'\');\n document.getElementById(\'meta-lab-id\').value = String(meta.lab_id || \'\');\n document.getElementById(\'meta-operator-name\').value = String(meta.operator_name || \'\');\n document.getElementById(\'meta-robot-id\').value = String(meta.robot_id || \'\');\n document.getElementById(\'meta-control-freq\').value = String(meta.control_freq || \'\');\n\n // Load annotation for current user if exists\n const currentUser = (document.getElementById(\'meta-operator-name\')?.value || \'\').trim();\n if (currentUser && annotators.includes(currentUser)) {\n const annotation = await fetch(`/api/annotations/${sample.id}/${encodeURIComponent(currentUser)}`).then(r => r.json());\n populateForm(annotation);\n } else {\n document.getElementById(\'annotation-form\').reset();\n }\n\n // Load VLM annotation if available\n await loadVLMAnnotation(sample.id, sample.vlm_annotators);\n }\n\n async function loadVLMAnnotation(sampleId, vlmAnnotators) {\n const vlmPanel = document.getElementById(\'vlm-panel\');\n currentVlmAnnotation = null;\n\n if (!vlmAnnotators || vlmAnnotators.length === 0) {\n vlmPanel.style.display = \'none\';\n return;\n }\n\n // Load the first VLM annotation\n const vlmAnnotatorName = vlmAnnotators[0];\n const vlmAnnotation = await fetch(`/api/annotations/${sampleId}/${encodeURIComponent(vlmAnnotatorName)}`).then(r => r.json());\n\n if (!vlmAnnotation || Object.keys(vlmAnnotation).length === 0) {\n vlmPanel.style.display = \'none\';\n return;\n }\n\n currentVlmAnnotation = vlmAnnotation;\n vlmPanel.style.display = \'block\';\n\n // Update VLM fields\n document.getElementById(\'vlm-annotator\').textContent = vlmAnnotation.annotator || vlmAnnotatorName;\n const cat = vlmAnnotation.failure_category;\n document.getElementById(\'vlm-category\').textContent = Array.isArray(cat) ? cat.join(\', \') : (cat || \'--\');\n document.getElementById(\'vlm-description\').textContent = vlmAnnotation.failure_description || \'--\';\n document.getElementById(\'vlm-retry\').textContent = vlmAnnotation.would_retry || \'--\';\n\n // Update confidence\n const confidence = vlmAnnotation.aggregated_confidence;\n if (confidence !== undefined) {\n document.getElementById(\'vlm-confidence\').textContent = `${Math.round(confidence * 100)}% confidence`;\n } else {\n document.getElementById(\'vlm-confidence\').textContent = \'--\';\n }\n\n // Update per-view predictions\n const viewsList = document.getElementById(\'vlm-views-list\');\n const perView = vlmAnnotation.per_view_predictions || {};\n if (Object.keys(perView).length > 0) {\n viewsList.innerHTML = Object.entries(perView).map(([view, pred]) => {\n const viewCat = Array.isArray(pred.failure_category) ? pred.failure_category.join(\', \') : pred.failure_category;\n return `\n <div class="vlm-view-item">\n <span class="vlm-view-name">${view}</span>\n <span>${viewCat} (${Math.round((pred.confidence || 0) * 100)}%)</span>\n </div>`;\n }).join(\'\');\n document.getElementById(\'vlm-views\').style.display = \'block\';\n } else {\n document.getElementById(\'vlm-views\').style.display = \'none\';\n }\n }\n\n function populateForm(annotation) {\n const form = document.getElementById(\'annotation-form\');\n form.reset();\n\n const asElementList = (elements) => {\n if (!elements) return [];\n if (elements instanceof RadioNodeList) return Array.from(elements);\n if (elements instanceof NodeList || elements instanceof HTMLCollection) return Array.from(elements);\n return [elements];\n };\n\n for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(annotation)) {\n if (key === \'annotated_at\' || key === \'annotator\' || key === \'source\') continue;\n\n const elements = form.elements[key];\n if (!elements) continue;\n const elementList = asElementList(elements);\n if (elementList.length === 0) continue;\n const first = elementList[0];\n\n if (first.type === \'radio\') {\n for (const el of elementList) {\n el.checked = String(el.value) === String(value);\n }\n } else if (first.type === \'checkbox\') {\n const values = (Array.isArray(value) ? value : [value]).map(v => String(v));\n for (const el of elementList) {\n el.checked = values.includes(String(el.value));\n }\n } else {\n first.value = Array.isArray(value) ? value.join(\', \') : String(value ?? \'\');\n }\n }\n applySuccessConditional();\n }\n\n function getFormData() {\n const form = document.getElementById(\'annotation-form\');\n const data = {};\n\n const asElementList = (elements) => {\n if (!elements) return [];\n if (elements instanceof RadioNodeList) return Array.from(elements);\n if (elements instanceof NodeList || elements instanceof HTMLCollection) return Array.from(elements);\n return [elements];\n };\n\n for (const q of questionnaire.questions) {\n const elements = form.elements[q.id];\n if (!elements) continue;\n const elementList = asElementList(elements);\n if (elementList.length === 0) continue;\n\n if (q.type === \'checkbox\') {\n data[q.id] = elementList.filter(el => el.checked).map(el => el.value);\n } else if (q.type === \'radio\') {\n const checked = elementList.find(el => el.checked);\n data[q.id] = checked ? checked.value : \'\';\n } else {\n data[q.id] = elementList[0].value;\n }\n }\n\n return data;\n }\n\n function getMetadataData() {\n return {\n episode_id: document.getElementById(\'meta-episode-id\')?.value || \'\',\n language_instruction: document.getElementById(\'meta-language-instruction\')?.value || \'\',\n policy_id: document.getElementById(\'meta-policy-id\')?.value || \'\',\n lab_id: document.getElementById(\'meta-lab-id\')?.value || \'\',\n operator_name: document.getElementById(\'meta-operator-name\')?.value || \'\',\n robot_id: document.getElementById(\'meta-robot-id\')?.value || \'\',\n control_freq: document.getElementById(\'meta-control-freq\')?.value || \'\',\n };\n }\n\n async function saveAnnotation() {\n const metadata = getMetadataData();\n const requiredMeta = [\n { key: \'operator_name\', elementId: \'meta-operator-name\' },\n { key: \'policy_id\', elementId: \'meta-policy-id\' },\n { key: \'lab_id\', elementId: \'meta-lab-id\' },\n { key: \'robot_id\', elementId: \'meta-robot-id\' },\n { key: \'control_freq\', elementId: \'meta-control-freq\' },\n ];\n let hasMetaError = false;\n for (const { key, elementId } of requiredMeta) {\n const wrap = document.getElementById(\'wrap-\' + elementId);\n if (!(metadata[key] || \'\').trim()) {\n wrap?.classList.add(\'meta-error\');\n hasMetaError = true;\n }\n }\n if (hasMetaError) {\n const first = requiredMeta.find(({ key }) => !(metadata[key] || \'\').trim());\n if (first) document.getElementById(first.elementId)?.focus();\n return;\n }\n const annotatorName = metadata.operator_name.trim();\n\n // Validate required checkbox groups (HTML required on individual checkboxes\n // means each must be checked, so we handle checkbox groups manually)\n for (const q of questionnaire.questions) {\n if (q.type !== \'checkbox\' || !q.required) continue;\n const group = document.querySelector(`[data-question-id="${q.id}"]`);\n if (!group || group.style.display === \'none\') continue;\n if (!group.querySelector(\'input[type="checkbox"]:checked\')) {\n alert(`Please select at least one option for "${q.label}".`);\n group.querySelector(\'input[type="checkbox"]\').focus();\n return;\n }\n }\n\n const form = document.getElementById(\'annotation-form\');\n if (!form.checkValidity()) {\n form.reportValidity();\n return;\n }\n\n const sample = samples[currentIndex];\n const data = getFormData();\n data.annotator = annotatorName;\n\n const binarySuccess = String(data.binary_success || \'\').toLowerCase();\n if (binarySuccess === \'success\') {\n metadata.success = 1.0;\n } else if (binarySuccess === \'failure\') {\n metadata.success = 0.0;\n }\n\n data.__metadata = metadata;\n\n await fetch(`/api/annotations/${sample.id}`, {\n method: \'POST\',\n headers: { \'Content-Type\': \'application/json\' },\n body: JSON.stringify(data)\n });\n\n // Refresh samples to update annotator list\n samples = await fetch(\'/api/samples\').then(r => r.json());\n updateProgress();\n\n // Advance to next sample\n if (currentIndex + 1 < samples.length) {\n await loadSample(currentIndex + 1);\n } else {\n await loadSample(currentIndex);\n }\n }\n\n // Clear meta-error state when the user types in a required field\n [\'meta-operator-name\', \'meta-policy-id\', \'meta-lab-id\', \'meta-robot-id\', \'meta-control-freq\'].forEach(id => {\n document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener(\'input\', () => {\n document.getElementById(\'wrap-\' + id)?.classList.remove(\'meta-error\');\n });\n });\n\n // Event listeners\n document.getElementById(\'btn-prev\').addEventListener(\'click\', () => loadSample(currentIndex - 1));\n document.getElementById(\'btn-next\').addEventListener(\'click\', () => loadSample(currentIndex + 1));\n document.getElementById(\'btn-save\').addEventListener(\'click\', saveAnnotation);\n document.getElementById(\'btn-apply-subdir-metadata\').addEventListener(\'click\', async () => {\n const sample = samples[currentIndex];\n if (!sample) {\n return;\n }\n\n const selectedFields = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(\'.meta-batch-field:checked\'));\n if (selectedFields.length === 0) {\n alert(\'Select at least one metadata field with the Apply to all checkbox.\');\n return;\n }\n\n const metadata = getMetadataData();\n const batchMetadata = {};\n selectedFields.forEach(fieldEl => {\n const key = fieldEl.dataset.metaKey;\n if (!key) return;\n batchMetadata[key] = metadata[key] ?? \'\';\n });\n\n const subdirectory = String(sample.subdirectory || \'\');\n const response = await fetch(\'/api/metadata/batch\', {\n method: \'POST\',\n headers: { \'Content-Type\': \'application/json\' },\n body: JSON.stringify({\n subdirectory,\n metadata: batchMetadata,\n }),\n });\n\n const result = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n if (!response.ok) {\n alert(result.error || \'Failed to apply subdirectory metadata.\');\n return;\n }\n\n const currentSampleId = sample.id;\n samples = await fetch(\'/api/samples\').then(r => r.json());\n const newIndex = samples.findIndex(s => s.id === currentSampleId);\n currentIndex = newIndex >= 0 ? newIndex : currentIndex;\n updateProgress();\n await loadSample(currentIndex);\n\n alert(`Updated ${result.updated_h5_samples || 0} sample(s) in ${formatSubdirectoryLabel(subdirectory)}.`);\n });\n\n // Accept VLM annotation button\n document.getElementById(\'btn-accept-vlm\').addEventListener(\'click\', async () => {\n const annotatorName = (document.getElementById(\'meta-operator-name\')?.value || \'\').trim();\n if (!annotatorName) {\n alert(\'Please set Operator in metadata before accepting VLM annotations.\');\n document.getElementById(\'meta-operator-name\')?.focus();\n return;\n }\n\n const sample = samples[currentIndex];\n const response = await fetch(`/api/annotations/${sample.id}/accept-vlm`, {\n method: \'POST\',\n headers: { \'Content-Type\': \'application/json\' },\n body: JSON.stringify({\n annotator: annotatorName,\n vlm_annotator: currentVlmAnnotation ? currentVlmAnnotation.annotator : null\n })\n });\n\n if (response.ok) {\n // Refresh samples\n samples = await fetch(\'/api/samples\').then(r => r.json());\n updateProgress();\n loadSample(currentIndex);\n\n // Auto-advance to next unannotated sample\n const nextUnannotated = samples.findIndex((s, i) => i > currentIndex && !s.has_human_annotation);\n if (nextUnannotated !== -1) {\n loadSample(nextUnannotated);\n }\n }\n });\n\n document.addEventListener(\'keydown\', (e) => {\n if (e.target.tagName === \'INPUT\' || e.target.tagName === \'TEXTAREA\' || e.target.tagName === \'SELECT\') {\n if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === \'Enter\') {\n saveAnnotation();\n }\n return;\n }\n\n if (e.key === \'ArrowLeft\') loadSample(currentIndex - 1);\n if (e.key === \'ArrowRight\') loadSample(currentIndex + 1);\n });\n\n // Questionnaire Editor\n const modal = document.getElementById(\'questionnaire-modal\');\n const editor = document.getElementById(\'questionnaire-editor\');\n const editorError = document.getElementById(\'editor-error\');\n\n document.getElementById(\'btn-edit-questionnaire\').addEventListener(\'click\', async () => {\n const content = await fetch(\'/api/questionnaire/raw\').then(r => r.text());\n editor.value = content;\n editorError.classList.remove(\'visible\');\n modal.classList.add(\'active\');\n editor.focus();\n });\n\n document.getElementById(\'modal-close\').addEventListener(\'click\', () => {\n modal.classList.remove(\'active\');\n });\n\n document.getElementById(\'btn-editor-cancel\').addEventListener(\'click\', () => {\n modal.classList.remove(\'active\');\n });\n\n document.getElementById(\'btn-editor-save\').addEventListener(\'click\', async () => {\n editorError.classList.remove(\'visible\');\n\n const response = await fetch(\'/api/questionnaire/raw\', {\n method: \'POST\',\n headers: { \'Content-Type\': \'text/plain\' },\n body: editor.value\n });\n\n if (!response.ok) {\n const data = await response.json();\n editorError.textContent = data.error || \'Failed to save\';\n editorError.classList.add(\'visible\');\n return;\n }\n\n modal.classList.remove(\'active\');\n\n // Reload questionnaire\n questionnaire = await fetch(\'/api/questionnaire\').then(r => r.json());\n document.getElementById(\'title\').textContent = questionnaire.title || \'Annotation\';\n renderQuestionnaire();\n\n // Re-populate form with current annotation\n const sample = samples[currentIndex];\n const currentUser = (document.getElementById(\'meta-operator-name\')?.value || \'\').trim();\n if (currentUser && sample.annotators && sample.annotators.includes(currentUser)) {\n const annotation = await fetch(`/api/annotations/${sample.id}/${encodeURIComponent(currentUser)}`).then(r => r.json());\n populateForm(annotation);\n }\n });\n\n // Close modal on escape key\n document.addEventListener(\'keydown\', (e) => {\n if (e.key === \'Escape\' && modal.classList.contains(\'active\')) {\n modal.classList.remove(\'active\');\n }\n });\n\n // Close modal on backdrop click\n modal.addEventListener(\'click\', (e) => {\n if (e.target === modal) {\n modal.classList.remove(\'active\');\n }\n });\n\n // Handle Tab key in editor for indentation\n editor.addEventListener(\'keydown\', (e) => {\n if (e.key === \'Tab\') {\n e.preventDefault();\n const start = editor.selectionStart;\n const end = editor.selectionEnd;\n editor.value = editor.value.substring(0, start) + \' \' + editor.value.substring(end);\n editor.selectionStart = editor.selectionEnd = start + 2;\n }\n });\n\n // Video sync logic: keep all views at the same timestep\n function setupVideoSync() {\n const videos = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(\'#video-container video\'));\n let syncing = false;\n let syncTimer = null;\n\n function startSync() {\n if (syncing) return false;\n syncing = true;\n clearTimeout(syncTimer);\n // Hold the flag for a short window so async events don\'t re-enter\n syncTimer = setTimeout(() => { syncing = false; }, 100);\n return true;\n }\n\n function syncTime(source) {\n if (!startSync()) return;\n const t = source.currentTime;\n for (const v of videos) {\n if (v !== source && v.style.display !== \'none\') {\n v.currentTime = t;\n }\n }\n }\n\n function syncPlay(source) {\n if (!startSync()) return;\n for (const v of videos) {\n if (v !== source && v.style.display !== \'none\') {\n v.currentTime = source.currentTime;\n v.play();\n }\n }\n }\n\n function syncPause(source) {\n if (!startSync()) return;\n for (const v of videos) {\n if (v !== source && v.style.display !== \'none\') {\n v.pause();\n v.currentTime = source.currentTime;\n }\n }\n }\n\n for (const v of videos) {\n v.addEventListener(\'seeked\', () => syncTime(v));\n v.addEventListener(\'play\', () => syncPlay(v));\n v.addEventListener(\'pause\', () => syncPause(v));\n }\n }\n\n init();\n </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n'
def main(): 
1156def main():
1157    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Video annotation tool for robotic failure samples")
1158    parser.add_argument("--samples-dir", type=Path, default=Path("samples"), help="Directory containing sample videos and metadata")
1159    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=5001, help="Port to run the server on")
1160    parser.add_argument("--annotations-file", type=Path, default=None, help="Path to annotations JSON file (default: annotations.json inside --samples-dir)")
1161    parser.add_argument("--no-browser", action="store_true", help="Don't open browser automatically")
1162    args = parser.parse_args()
1163
1164    runtime = configure_runtime(args.samples_dir.resolve())
1165
1166    if not runtime.samples_dir.exists():
1167        print(f"Error: Samples directory not found: {runtime.samples_dir}")
1168        return 1
1169
1170    annotations_file: Path | None = args.annotations_file.resolve() if args.annotations_file else None
1171    session_annotations_path = initialize_session_annotations(annotations_file=annotations_file)
1172
1173    print(f"Serving samples from: {runtime.samples_dir}")
1174    print(f"Questionnaire: {QUESTIONNAIRE_PATH}")
1175    print(f"Annotations will be saved to: {session_annotations_path.resolve()}")
1176    print(f"\nStarting server at http://localhost:{args.port}")
1177
1178    if not args.no_browser:
1179        webbrowser.open(f"http://localhost:{args.port}")
1180
1181    app.run(host="localhost", port=args.port, debug=False)
